---
title: "S…ôhiyy…ô M…ôlumatlarńĪnńĪn Analizi"
author: "Nurida Guluzada"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: TRUE
    toc_float: TRUE
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango

---


```{r logo_inject, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
htmltools::tags$script(htmltools::HTML("
  $(document).ready(function() {
    $('body').append(
      '<img src=\"https://logowik.com/content/uploads/images/code-academy2945.logowik.com.webp\" ' +
      'style=\"position:fixed; top:10px; right:10px; width:200px; z-index:9999;\"/>'
    );
  });
"))
```

```{r library_activaions, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
library(pacman)

p_load(
  data.table, dplyr, readxl, readr, lubridate, xlsx, httr, openxlsx,
  janitor, stringr, RODBC, RMariaDB, jsonlite, ssh, stringdist, reshape2,
  plotly, shiny, shinythemes, shinydashboard, shinyWidgets, knitr,
  rmarkdown, evaluate, base64enc, digest, highr, htmltools, xfun,
  yaml, mime, DT, themes, ggplot2, DBI, taskscheduleR,
  patchwork, mailR, tidyverse, kableExtra, scales, corrplot,
  broom, rpart, rpart.plot, pROC,moments,tidyr,corrplot,car,tibble,pROC,e1071,class,rpart.plot,purrr,
  install = FALSE
)
```

```{r data_import, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
patients     <- readRDS("C:/Users/Acer/Downloads/patients.rds")
encounters   <- readRDS("C:/Users/Acer/Downloads/encounters.rds")
observations <- readRDS("C:/Users/Acer/Downloads/observations.rds")


```

```{r ilkin_baxish, warning=F, error=F, message=F , results='hide', echo=FALSE}

tibble(
  C…ôdv…ôl   = c("patients", "encounters", "observations"),
  `S…ôtir`  = c(nrow(patients), nrow(encounters), nrow(observations)),
  `S√ľtun`  = c(ncol(patients), ncol(encounters), ncol(observations))
) %>%
  kable(caption = "Raw data √∂l√ß√ľl…ôri") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE)

colnames(patients)
colnames(encounters)
colnames(observations)
str(patients)
str(encounters)
str(observations)
colSums(is.na(patients))
colSums(is.na(encounters))
colSums(is.na(observations))
sapply(patients,     function(x) sum(x == "", na.rm = TRUE))
sapply(encounters,   function(x) sum(x == "", na.rm = TRUE))
sapply(observations, function(x) sum(x == "", na.rm = TRUE))
```




```{r data_cleaning, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
# ADDIM 1 ‚ÄĒ Gec tarixli pasiyentl…ôr
sum(patients$BIRTHDATE > as.Date("2017-05-24"))
patients <- patients %>% filter(BIRTHDATE <= as.Date("2017-05-24"))

 
# ADDIM 2 ‚ÄĒ BoŇü stringl…ôr ‚Üí NA
patients <- patients %>% mutate(across(where(is.character), ~na_if(.x, "")))
sapply(patients, function(x) sum(x == "", na.rm = TRUE))

# ADDIM 3 ‚ÄĒ No matching  encounters (Matching olmayan encounterl…ôr)
sum(!encounters$PATIENT %in% patients$ID)
encounters <- encounters %>% filter(PATIENT %in% patients$ID)

# ADDIM 4 ‚ÄĒ √Ėl√ľmd…ôn sonrakńĪ encounters
encounters <- encounters %>%
  left_join(patients %>% select(ID, DEATHDATE), by = c("PATIENT" = "ID")) %>%
  filter(is.na(DEATHDATE) | DATE <= DEATHDATE) %>%
  select(-DEATHDATE)

# ADDIM 5 ‚ÄĒ No matching observations (Matching olmayan observations)
observations <- observations %>% filter(PATIENT %in% patients$ID)

# ADDIM 6 ‚ÄĒ BoŇü VALUE + m…ônfi HbA1c
observations <- observations %>% filter(VALUE != "")
observations <- observations %>%
  mutate(vn = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(VALUE))) %>%
  filter(!(DESCRIPTION == "Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total in Blood" &
             !is.na(vn) & vn <= 0)) %>%
  select(-vn)

# ADDIM 7 ‚ÄĒ R…ôq…ômsal / Kategorik ayńĪrma
obs_numeric <- observations %>%
  filter(UNITS != "{nominal}") %>%
  mutate(value_num = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(VALUE))) %>%
  filter(!is.na(value_num))

obs_categorical <- observations %>% filter(UNITS == "{nominal}")
```




```{r temizlenmish_data_yekun_olculer, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
cleaning_summary <- tibble(
  C…ôdv…ôl       = c("patients", "encounters", "encounters",
                   "observations", "observations", "observations",
                   "obs_numeric", "obs_categorical"),
  Problem      = c(
    "Gec tarixli pasiyent (BIRTHDATE > 2017-05-24) + boŇü string ‚Üí NA",
    "Orphan PATIENT ID",
    "√Ėl√ľmd…ôn sonra encounter (DATE > DEATHDATE)",
    "Orphan PATIENT ID",
    "BoŇü VALUE",
    "M…ônfi / sńĪfńĪr HbA1c",
    "R…ôq…ômsal √∂l√ßm…ôl…ôr (ayrńĪldńĪ)",
    "Kategorik d…ôy…ôrl…ôr (ayrńĪldńĪ)"
  ),
  `D…ôyiŇüiklik` = c(
    "19 silindi ¬∑ 333,431 boŇü string ‚Üí NA",
    "2,620 silindi", "115 silindi", "10,978 silindi",
    "13,963 silindi", "148 silindi",
    "5,320,994 s…ôtir", "37,235 s…ôtir"
  ),
  `Yekun s…ôtir sayńĪ` = c(
    format(nrow(patients), big.mark = ","),
    format(nrow(encounters), big.mark = ","),
    format(nrow(encounters), big.mark = ","),
    format(nrow(observations), big.mark = ","),
    format(nrow(observations), big.mark = ","),
    format(nrow(observations), big.mark = ","),
    format(nrow(obs_numeric), big.mark = ","),
    format(nrow(obs_categorical), big.mark = ",")
  )
)




kable(cleaning_summary,
      caption = "<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>Data Cleaning ‚ÄĒ Data T…ômizl…ôm…ô X√ľlas…ô</div>",
      align   = c("l", "l", "r", "r"),
      escape  = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(
    bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
    full_width = FALSE
  ) %>%
  column_spec(2, width = "35em") %>%
  column_spec(3, width = "15em") %>%
  column_spec(4, width = "10em")

```

# Deskriptiv T…ôhlil



## 1.1 Pasiyent DemoqrafiyasńĪ

### YaŇü paylanmasńĪ v…ô yaŇü qruplarńĪ

```{r yas_paylanmasi, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
patients <- patients %>%
  mutate(
    ref_date  = as.Date(ifelse(is.na(DEATHDATE), "2017-05-24",
                               as.character(DEATHDATE))),
    age       = as.numeric(ref_date - as.Date(BIRTHDATE)) / 365.25,
    age_group = cut(age, breaks = c(0, 18, 40, 65, Inf),
                    labels = c("0‚Äď18", "19‚Äď40", "41‚Äď65", "65+"),
                    right  = FALSE)
  )

# YaŇü statistikasńĪ c…ôdv…ôli

age_stats <- patients %>%
  summarise(
    `Orta (Mean)`  = round(mean(age, na.rm = T), 1),
    `Median`       = round(median(age, na.rm = T), 1),
    `Std. k…ônarlaŇüma`   = round(sd(age, na.rm = T), 1),
    `Min`          = round(min(age, na.rm = T), 1),
    `Max`          = round(max(age, na.rm = T), 1),
    `IQR`          = round(IQR(age, na.rm = T), 1)
  )

kable(age_stats, caption = "<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>YaŇü ‚ÄĒ …ôsas statistika</div>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)


# YaŇü qrupu paylanmasńĪ

age_group_tbl <- patients %>%
  count(age_group) %>%
  mutate(Faiz = round(100 * n / sum(n), 1)) %>%
  rename(`YaŇü qrupu` = age_group, `Say` = n)

kable(age_group_tbl, caption = "<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>YaŇü qruplarńĪ √ľzr…ô paylanma</div>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)



ggplot(patients, aes(x = age)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 5, fill = "#3D663E", color = "white", alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = mean(patients$age, na.rm = T),
             color = "#F5421D", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  annotate("text", x = mean(patients$age, na.rm = T) + 3, y = 4500,
           label = paste0("Ort: ", round(mean(patients$age, na.rm = T), 1)),
           color = "#F5421D", size = 3.5) +
  labs(title    = "Pasiyentl…ôrin yaŇü paylanmasńĪ",
       subtitle = "H…ôr s√ľtun 5 illik aralńĪńüńĪ t…ômsil edir",
       x = "YaŇü", y = "Pasiyent sayńĪ") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "gray50"))
```

> **Ňě…ôrh:** YaŇü histoqramńĪ pasiyentl…ôrin yaŇü paylanmasńĪnńĪ 5 illik aralńĪqlarla g√∂st…ôrir. Orta yaŇü `r round(mean(patients$age, na.rm=T), 1)`-dńĪr (qńĪrmńĪzńĪ k…ôsik x…ôtt). Paylanma sańüa meyllidir ‚ÄĒ …ôn y√ľks…ôk s√ľtun 55‚Äď60 yaŇü aralńĪńüńĪna aiddir, y…ôni bu populyasiyada orta yaŇülńĪ v…ô yaŇülńĪ pasiyentl…ôr √ľst√ľnl√ľk t…ôŇükil edir. 0‚Äď10 yaŇü aralńĪńüńĪnda pasiyent sayńĪ nisb…ôt…ôn azdńĪr ‚ÄĒ bu sintetik datanńĪn x√ľsusiyy…ôtidir.65+ yaŇü qrupu √ľmumi pasiyentl…ôrin `r round(100*mean(patients$age>=65, na.rm=T), 1)`%-ni t…ôŇükil edir ‚ÄĒ bu qrup klinik baxńĪmdan …ôn h…ôssas qrupdur. 75 yaŇüdan sonra is…ô pasiyent sayńĪ k…ôskin azalńĪr, bu is…ô yaŇülńĪ populyasiyada √∂l√ľm nisb…ôtinin y√ľks…ôk olmasńĪnńĪ …ôks etdirir.



### Cins paylanmasńĪ

```{r cins_paylanmasi, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
cins_tbl <- patients %>%
  count(GENDER) %>%
  mutate(Cins = ifelse(GENDER == "F", "QadńĪn", "KiŇüi"),
         Faiz = round(100 * n / sum(n), 1)) %>%
  select(Cins, Say = n, Faiz)

kable(cins_tbl, caption = "<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>Pasiyentl…ôrin cins √ľzr…ô paylanmasńĪ</div>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)

patients %>%
  mutate(Cins = ifelse(GENDER == "F", "QadńĪn", "KiŇüi")) %>%
  count(Cins) %>%
  mutate(Faiz = round(100 * n / sum(n), 1)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Cins, y = n, fill = Cins)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(Faiz, "%")),
            vjust = -0.5, size = 4, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("QadńĪn" = "#E75480", "KiŇüi" = "#2E75B6")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma,
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))) +
  labs(title = "Pasiyentl…ôrin cins √ľzr…ô paylanmasńĪ",
       x = NULL, y = "Pasiyent sayńĪ") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"))

patients %>%
  mutate(Cins = ifelse(GENDER == "F", "QadńĪn", "KiŇüi")) %>%
  count(age_group, Cins) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = age_group, y = n, fill = Cins)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge", alpha = 0.88) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("QadńĪn" = "#E75480", "KiŇüi" = "#2E75B6")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(title = "YaŇü qrupu √ľzr…ô cinsl…ôrin paylanmasńĪ",
       x = "YaŇü qrupu", y = "Pasiyent sayńĪ", fill = "Cins") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"))
```

> **Ňě…ôrh:** Cins √ľzr…ô paylanma qrafiki g√∂st…ôrir ki, kiŇüi v…ô qadńĪn
> pasiyentl…ôr arasńĪnda dem…ôk olar ki, tam b…ôrab…ôrlik m√∂vcuddur ‚ÄĒ
> kiŇüil…ôr 50.2%, qadńĪnlar is…ô 49.8% t…ôŇükil edir. Bu balans
> statistik testl…ôr √ľ√ß√ľn …ôlveriŇüli Ňü…ôrait yaradńĪr, √ß√ľnki qrup
> √∂l√ß√ľl…ôri arasńĪnda b√∂y√ľk f…ôrq olmadńĪqda t-test v…ô chi-square
> n…ôtic…ôl…ôri daha etibarlńĪ olur. Real klinik datasetl…ôrd…ô is…ô
> ad…ôt…ôn qadńĪn pasiyentl…ôr bir q…ôd…ôr √ľst√ľnl√ľk t…ôŇükil edir ‚ÄĒ
> bu sintetik datanńĪn s√ľni balanslanmasńĪndan qaynaqlanńĪr.

> **Ňě…ôrh:** YaŇü qrupu √ľzr…ô cins m√ľqayis…ôsi g√∂st…ôrir ki, b√ľt√ľn
> yaŇü qruplarńĪnda kiŇüi v…ô qadńĪn sayńĪ bir-birin…ô √ßox yaxńĪndńĪr.
> ∆Źn b√∂y√ľk qrup 41‚Äď65 yaŇü aralńĪńüńĪdńĪr ‚ÄĒ h…ôm kiŇüil…ôrd…ô (~25,000),
> h…ôm qadńĪnlarda (~24,000) bu qrup dominant m√∂vqed…ôdir. 0‚Äď18
> yaŇü qrupunda h…ôr iki cinsin sayńĪ …ôn azdńĪr. 65+ yaŇü qrupunda
> is…ô kiŇüi v…ô qadńĪn saylarńĪ yen…ô b…ôrab…ôrdir ‚ÄĒ bu real
> populyasiyadan f…ôrqlidir, √ß√ľnki h…ôyatda qadńĪnlar kiŇüil…ôrd…ôn
> orta hesabla daha uzun yaŇüayńĪr. Bu da sintetik datanńĪn
> x√ľsusiyy…ôtl…ôrind…ôn biridir.



### ńįrq v…ô etnik m…ônsubiyy…ôt

```{r irq_etnik, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
irq_tbl <- patients %>%
  count(RACE) %>%
  mutate(Faiz = round(100 * n / sum(n), 1)) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  rename(ńįrq = RACE, Say = n)

kable(irq_tbl, caption ="<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>ńįrq √ľzr…ô pasiyent paylanmasńĪ</div>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)

irq_tbl %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(ńįrq, Say), y = Say, fill = ńįrq)) +
  geom_col(alpha = 0.88, width = 0.65) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(Faiz, "%")),
            hjust = -0.15, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma,
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(title = "Pasiyentl…ôrin irql…ôr √ľzr…ô paylanmasńĪ",
       x = NULL, y = "Pasiyent sayńĪ") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"))

etnik_tbl <- patients %>%
  count(ETHNICITY) %>%
  mutate(Faiz = round(100 * n / sum(n), 1)) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  rename(`Etnik m…ônsubiyy…ôt` = ETHNICITY, Say = n)

datatable(etnik_tbl, caption = "Etnik m…ônsubiyy…ôt √ľzr…ô paylanma",
          rownames = FALSE, filter = "top",
          extensions = c("Buttons", "FixedHeader", "Scroller", "Responsive"),
          options = list(dom = "Bfrtip", pageLength = 10,
                         buttons = list("copy", "print",
                                        list(extend = "collection",
                                             buttons = c("csv", "excel", "pdf"),
                                             text = "Download"))))

etnik_tbl %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(`Etnik m…ônsubiyy…ôt`, Say), y = Say)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#5B8DB8", alpha = 0.88, width = 0.65) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(Faiz, "%")),
            hjust = -0.15, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma,
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  labs(title = "Etnik m…ônsubiyy…ôt √ľzr…ô paylanma",
       x = NULL, y = "Pasiyent sayńĪ") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"))
```

> **Ňě…ôrh:** ńįrq √ľzr…ô paylanma qrafiki g√∂st…ôrir ki, populyasiyanńĪn
> b√∂y√ľk …ôks…ôriyy…ôti ‚ÄĒ 77.4%-i ‚ÄĒ "white" irq qrupuna aiddir.
> Hispanic qrupu 9.7% il…ô ikinci yerd…ôdir, onu black (7.2%) v…ô
> asian (5.8%) izl…ôyir. "Native" qrupu is…ô 0% g√∂st…ôrir ‚ÄĒ c…ômi
> 12 pasiyentl…ô …ôn az t…ômsil olunan qrupdur. Bu g√ľcl√ľ irq
> …ôyriliyini n…ôz…ôr…ô alaraq irq √ľzr…ô statistik m√ľqayis…ôl…ôrd…ô
> (ANOVA) "native" qrupunun n…ôtic…ôl…ôri etibarsńĪz
> hesab edilm…ôlidir ‚ÄĒ √ß√ľnki n=12 statistik g√ľc √ľ√ß√ľn
> kifay…ôt deyil.

> **Ňě…ôrh:** Etnik m…ônsubiyy…ôt √ľzr…ô paylanmada irish qrupu 20.7%
> il…ô dominant m√∂vqed…ôdir, onu italian (12.6%) v…ô english (9.9%)
> izl…ôyir. Bu √ľ√ß qrup birlikd…ô populyasiyanńĪn 43%-ni t…ôŇükil
> edir. MaraqlńĪ bir m√ľŇüahid…ô: puerto_rican (6.8%) v…ô french
> (7.2%) qruplarńĪ da …ôh…ômiyy…ôtli pay tutur. American_indian
> qrupu is…ô irq paylanmasńĪndakńĪ "native" qrupu kimi ‚ÄĒ 0%-…ô
> yaxńĪndńĪr, son d…ôr…ôc…ô az t…ômsil olunur. √úmumiyy…ôtl…ô,
> populyasiyanńĪn Avropa m…ônŇü…ôli etnik qruplara dominant
> olmasńĪ Massachusetts ŇütatńĪnńĪn tarixi demografik
> strukturunu …ôks etdirir.



### Ail…ô v…ôziyy…ôti

```{r aile_veziyyeti, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
aile_tbl <- patients %>%
  mutate(MARITAL = case_when(
    MARITAL == "M"  ~ "Evli",
    MARITAL == "S"  ~ "Subay",
    is.na(MARITAL)  ~ "M…ôlumat yoxdur",
    TRUE            ~ MARITAL
  )) %>%
  count(MARITAL) %>%
  mutate(Faiz = round(100 * n / sum(n), 1)) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  rename(`Ail…ô v…ôziyy…ôti` = MARITAL, Say = n)

kable(aile_tbl, caption = "<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>Ail…ô v…ôziyy…ôti √ľzr…ô paylanma</div>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)

aile_tbl %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = "", y = Say, fill = `Ail…ô v…ôziyy…ôti`)) +
  geom_col(width = 1, color = "white") +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(Faiz, "%")),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            size = 4, fontface = "bold", color = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Evli"           = "#2E75B6",
                                "Subay"          = "#70AD47",
                                "M…ôlumat yoxdur" = "#BFBFBF")) +
  labs(title = "Ail…ô v…ôziyy…ôti √ľzr…ô paylanma",
       x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = NULL) +
  theme_void(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        legend.position = "right")
```

> **Ňě…ôrh:** T…ôhlil n…ôtic…ôl…ôrin…ô …ôsas…ôn pasiyentl…ôrin 57.2%-i evli, 14.5%-i is…ô subaydńĪr. Bununla yanaŇüńĪ, ail…ô v…ôziyy…ôti √ľzr…ô m…ôlumat √ßatńĪŇümazlńĪńüńĪ diqq…ôt √ß…ôkir ‚ÄĒ m√ľŇüahid…ôl…ôrin 28.3%-ind…ô bu sah…ô doldurulmayńĪb. Bu h…ôcmd…ô missing data d…ôyiŇü…ôn √ľzr…ô aparńĪlan analizl…ôrin interpretasiyasńĪna t…ôsir g√∂st…ôr…ô bil…ôr v…ô n…ôtic…ôl…ôrin √ľmumi populyasiyanńĪ tam …ôks etdirm…ôsini m…ôhdudlaŇüdńĪra bil…ôr. Ail…ô v…ôziyy…ôti sosial v…ô davranńĪŇü faktorlarńĪ il…ô …ôlaq…ôli ola bil…ôc…ôyind…ôn, g…ôl…ôc…ôk m…ôlumat toplama prosesind…ô bu d…ôyiŇü…ônin tam qeyd olunmasńĪ analitik keyfiyy…ôti artńĪrar..



### Sańü qalan v…ô v…ôfat etmiŇü pasiyentl…ôr

```{r olum_nisbet, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
olum_tbl <- patients %>%
  mutate(Status = ifelse(is.na(DEATHDATE), "Sańü qalan", "V…ôfat etmiŇü")) %>%
  count(Status) %>%
  mutate(Faiz = round(100 * n / sum(n), 1)) %>%
  rename(Say = n)

kable(olum_tbl, caption = "<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>Sańü qalan & v…ôfat etmiŇü pasiyentl…ôr</div>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)

olum_yas <- patients %>%
  mutate(Status = ifelse(is.na(DEATHDATE), "Sańü qalan", "V…ôfat etmiŇü")) %>%
  count(age_group, Status) %>%
  group_by(age_group) %>%
  mutate(Faiz = round(100 * n / sum(n), 1)) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(olum_yas, aes(x = age_group, y = Faiz, fill = Status)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack", alpha = 0.88) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(Faiz, "%")),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            size = 3.5, color = "white", fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Sańü qalan"    = "#2E75B6",
                                "V…ôfat etmiŇü" = "#C0392B")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(scale = 1)) +
  labs(title    = "YaŇü qrupu √ľzr…ô sańü qalan / v…ôfat ed…ôn nisb…ôti",
       subtitle = "H…ôr yaŇü qrupunda 100% √ľz…ôrind…ôn",
       x = "YaŇü qrupu", y = "Faiz (%)", fill = "Status") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "gray50"))
```

> **Ňě…ôrh:** Bu qrafik h…ôr yaŇü qrupunda √∂l√ľm nisb…ôtinin nec…ô
> d…ôyiŇüdiyini a√ßńĪq Ňü…ôkild…ô ortaya qoyur. 0‚Äď18 yaŇü qrupunda
> √∂l√ľm nisb…ôti c…ômi 7.7% ‚ÄĒ bu g√∂zl…ônil…ôn n…ôtic…ôdir, uŇüaq
> v…ô yeniyetm…ôl…ôrd…ô √∂l√ľm riski klinik olaraq daha aŇüańüńĪdńĪr.
> 19‚Äď40 yaŇü qrupunda bu r…ôq…ôm 11.1%-…ô y√ľks…ôlir. 41‚Äď65 yaŇü
> qrupunda is…ô ciddi artńĪm m√ľŇüahid…ô edilir ‚ÄĒ 30.4%, y…ôni
> h…ôr 3 pasiyentd…ôn biri bu yaŇü qrupunda data toplama
> d√∂vr√ľ …ôrzind…ô v…ôfat etmiŇüdir. ∆Źn kritik n…ôtic…ô is…ô
> 65+ yaŇü qrupundadńĪr ‚ÄĒ √∂l√ľm nisb…ôti 47.4%-…ô √ßatńĪr,
> y…ôni bu yaŇü qrupundakńĪ pasiyentl…ôrin dem…ôk olar ki,
> yarńĪsńĪ v…ôfat etmiŇüdir. Bu tapńĪntńĪ stakeholderl…ôr √ľ√ß√ľn
> vacib bir siqnaldńĪr: yaŇülńĪ pasiyentl…ôr √ľ√ß√ľn erk…ôn
> m√ľdaxil…ô proqramlarńĪ, m√ľnt…ôz…ôm izl…ôm…ô v…ô preventiv
> tibbi xidm…ôtl…ôr…ô investisiya x…ôrcl…ôrini …ôsaslandńĪrńĪr.
> Sad…ô dill…ô des…ôk ‚ÄĒ bu qrafik g√∂st…ôrir ki, 65 yaŇüdan
> sonra tibbi diqq…ôt ikiqat artmalńĪdńĪr.


### Dońüum yeri ‚ÄĒ ilk 10 Ňü…ôh…ôr

```{r dogum_yer, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
dogum_tbl <- patients %>%
  mutate(city = str_extract(BIRTHPLACE, "^[^,]+") %>% str_trim()) %>%
  count(city, name = "Say") %>%
  arrange(desc(Say)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10) %>%
  mutate(Faiz = round(100 * Say / nrow(patients), 1)) %>%
  rename(`Dońüum Ňü…ôh…ôri` = city)

kable(dogum_tbl, caption = "<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>∆Źn √ßox pasiyent olan dońüum Ňü…ôh…ôrl…ôri (Top 10)</div>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)

dogum_tbl %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(`Dońüum Ňü…ôh…ôri`, Say), y = Say)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#2E75B6", alpha = 0.88, width = 0.65) +
  geom_text(aes(label = scales::comma(Say)),
            hjust = -0.15, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma,
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.2))) +
  labs(title    = "Pasiyentl…ôrin dońüulduńüu Ňü…ôh…ôrl…ôr √ľzr…ô paylanmasńĪ",
       subtitle = "Top 10 Ňü…ôh…ôr",
       x = NULL, y = "Pasiyent sayńĪ") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "gray50"))
```

> **Ňě…ôrh:** Top 10 dońüum Ňü…ôh…ôri qrafiki g√∂st…ôrir ki, pasiyentl…ôrin
> b√∂y√ľk hiss…ôsi Massachusetts ŇütatńĪnńĪn Ňü…ôh…ôrl…ôrind…ô dońüulub.
> Boston a√ßńĪq ara il…ô birinci yerd…ôdir ‚ÄĒ 12,456 pasiyent il…ô
> dig…ôr Ňü…ôh…ôrl…ôrd…ôn 3 d…ôf…ôd…ôn √ßox √ľst√ľnd√ľr. Bu t…ô…ôcc√ľbl√ľ
> deyil, √ß√ľnki Boston Massachusetts-in …ôn b√∂y√ľk Ňü…ôh…ôridir
> v…ô …ôhali sńĪxlńĪńüńĪ …ôn y√ľks…ôk olan m…ôrk…ôzidir. ńįkinci sńĪrada
> Worcester (3,674), √ľ√ß√ľnc√ľd…ô is…ô Springfield (3,127) g…ôlir.
> Qeyd etm…ôk lazńĪmdńĪr ki, bu s√ľtun pasiyentin yaŇüadńĪńüńĪ yeri
> deyil, dońüulduńüu yeri g√∂st…ôrir ‚ÄĒ dolayńĪsńĪ il…ô bu qrafik
> "pasiyentl…ôr hara gedir" sualńĪnńĪ deyil, "bu insanlar
> haradan g…ôlmiŇüdir" sualńĪnńĪ cavablandńĪrńĪr. B√ľt√ľn Ňü…ôh…ôrl…ôrin
> "MA US" ‚ÄĒ y…ôni Massachusetts, ABŇě ‚ÄĒ olmasńĪ sintetik datanńĪn
> cońürafi fokusunu bir daha t…ôsdiql…ôyir.



### ńįrq v…ô ail…ô v…ôziyy…ôti ‚ÄĒ √ßarpaz analiz

```{r irq_aile, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
# ńįrq √ó ail…ô v…ôziyy…ôti √ßarpaz c…ôdv…ôl
irq_aile <- patients %>%
  mutate(
    MARITAL_label = case_when(
      MARITAL == "M"  ~ "Evli",
      MARITAL == "S"  ~ "Subay",
      is.na(MARITAL)  ~ "M…ôlumat yoxdur",
      TRUE            ~ MARITAL
    ),
    RACE = str_to_title(RACE)
  ) %>%
  filter(RACE != "Native") %>%          # n=12, statistik etibarsńĪz
  count(RACE, MARITAL_label) %>%
  group_by(RACE) %>%
  mutate(Faiz = round(100 * n / sum(n), 1)) %>%
  ungroup()

# GeniŇü format ‚ÄĒ c…ôdv…ôl √ľ√ß√ľn
irq_aile_wide <- irq_aile %>%
  select(RACE, MARITAL_label, Faiz) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = MARITAL_label, values_from = Faiz, values_fill = 0) %>%
  rename(`ńįrq` = RACE)

kable(irq_aile_wide,
      caption = "<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>ńįrq √ó Ail…ô v…ôziyy…ôti ‚ÄĒ faiz paylanmasńĪ (%)</div>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                full_width = FALSE)

# Stacked bar ‚ÄĒ irq √ľzr…ô ail…ô v…ôziyy…ôti
irq_aile %>%
  mutate(RACE = factor(RACE,
                       levels = irq_aile %>%
                         filter(MARITAL_label == "Evli") %>%
                         arrange(desc(Faiz)) %>%
                         pull(RACE))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = RACE, y = Faiz, fill = MARITAL_label)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack", alpha = 0.88, width = 0.65) +
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Faiz >= 5, paste0(Faiz, "%"), "")),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            size = 3.2, color = "white", fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Evli"           = "#2E75B6",
    "Subay"          = "#70AD47",
    "M…ôlumat yoxdur" = "#BDC3C7"
  )) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(scale = 1)) +
  labs(title    = "ńįrq √ľzr…ô ail…ô v…ôziyy…ôti paylanmasńĪ",
       subtitle = "H…ôr irq qrupu daxilind…ô 100% √ľz…ôrind…ôn | Native qrupu (n=12) xaric edilib",
       x = NULL, y = "Faiz (%)", fill = "Ail…ô v…ôziyy…ôti") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "gray50"),
        legend.position = "top")
```

> **Ňě…ôrh:** ńįrq √ľzr…ô ail…ô v…ôziyy…ôti √ßarpaz analizind…ôn
> maraqlńĪ f…ôrql…ôr √ľz…ô √ßńĪxńĪr. "M…ôlumat yoxdur" kateqoriyasńĪ
> b√ľt√ľn irq qruplarńĪnda m√ľ…ôyy…ôn pay tutur ‚ÄĒ bu boŇüluńüun
> irq…ô g√∂r…ô b…ôrab…ôr paylanńĪb-paylanmadńĪńüńĪnńĪ vizual olaraq
> g√∂rm…ôk m√ľmk√ľnd√ľr. Evlilik nisb…ôti irq qruplarńĪ arasńĪnda
> f…ôrql…ônir ‚ÄĒ bu real sosio-demoqrafik t…ôdqiqatlarda da
> m√ľŇüahid…ô olunan bir n√ľmun…ôdir. Lakin sintetik data
> kontekstind…ô bu f…ôrql…ôri real populyasiyaya birbaŇüa
> √∂t√ľrm…ôk d√ľzg√ľn olmaz ‚ÄĒ interpretasiya ehtiyatla
> aparńĪlmalńĪdńĪr. √úmumi tendensiya: evli pasiyentl…ôr
> h…ôr irq qrupunda dominant kateqoriyadńĪr.



### Cins √ľzr…ô ail…ô v…ôziyy…ôti

```{r cins_aile, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
cins_aile <- patients %>%
  mutate(
    Cins = ifelse(GENDER == "F", "QadńĪn", "KiŇüi"),
    MARITAL_label = case_when(
      MARITAL == "M"  ~ "Evli",
      MARITAL == "S"  ~ "Subay",
      is.na(MARITAL)  ~ "M…ôlumat yoxdur",
      TRUE            ~ MARITAL
    )
  ) %>%
  count(Cins, MARITAL_label) %>%
  group_by(Cins) %>%
  mutate(Faiz = round(100 * n / sum(n), 1)) %>%
  ungroup()

cins_aile %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Cins, y = Faiz, fill = MARITAL_label)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge", alpha = 0.88, width = 0.65) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(Faiz, "%")),
            position = position_dodge(0.65), vjust = -0.4,
            size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Evli"           = "#2E75B6",
    "Subay"          = "#70AD47",
    "M…ôlumat yoxdur" = "#BDC3C7"
  )) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(scale = 1),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  labs(title    = "Cins √ľzr…ô ail…ô v…ôziyy…ôti paylanmasńĪ",
       subtitle = "KiŇüi v…ô qadńĪnlarda evlilik, subaylńĪq v…ô m…ôlumat boŇüluńüu m√ľqayis…ôsi",
       x = NULL, y = "Faiz (%)", fill = "Ail…ô v…ôziyy…ôti") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "gray50"),
        legend.position = "top")
```

> **Ňě…ôrh:** Cins √ľzr…ô ail…ô v…ôziyy…ôti m√ľqayis…ôsi g√∂st…ôrir ki,
> kiŇüi v…ô qadńĪnlarda evlilik nisb…ôti dem…ôk olar eynidir.
> "M…ôlumat yoxdur" kateqoriyasńĪnńĪn h…ôr iki cinsd…ô b…ôrab…ôr
> paylanmasńĪ bu boŇüluńüun cinsd…ôn asńĪlńĪ olmadńĪńüńĪnńĪ, y…ôni
> sistematik toplama problemi olmadńĪńüńĪnńĪ g√∂st…ôrir.
> SubaylńĪq nisb…ôti d…ô h…ôr iki cinsd…ô oxŇüardńĪr ‚ÄĒ bu sintetik
> datanńĪn cins √ľzr…ô s√ľni balansńĪnńĪn ail…ô v…ôziyy…ôti
> d…ôyiŇü…ônin…ô d…ô …ôks olunduńüunu g√∂st…ôrir.



### YaŇü qrupu √ľzr…ô m√ľraci…ôt intensivliyi

```{r yas_enc_intensivlik, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
# H…ôr pasiyentin m√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ + yaŇü qrupu + cins
enc_yas_cins <- encounters %>%
  count(PATIENT, name = "enc_say") %>%
  left_join(patients %>% select(ID, age_group, GENDER, DEATHDATE),
            by = c("PATIENT" = "ID")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(age_group)) %>%
  mutate(
    Cins   = ifelse(GENDER == "F", "QadńĪn", "KiŇüi"),
    Status = ifelse(is.na(DEATHDATE), "Sańü qalan", "V…ôfat etmiŇü")
  )

# X√ľlas…ô c…ôdv…ôl ‚ÄĒ yaŇü √ó cins
enc_yas_summary <- enc_yas_cins %>%
  group_by(age_group, Cins) %>%
  summarise(
    `Pasiyent sayńĪ`  = n(),
    `Orta m√ľraci…ôt`  = round(mean(enc_say), 1),
    `Median m√ľraci…ôt`= round(median(enc_say), 1),
    `Max m√ľraci…ôt`   = max(enc_say),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rename(`YaŇü qrupu` = age_group)

kable(enc_yas_summary,
      caption = "<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>YaŇü qrupu √ó Cins ‚ÄĒ m√ľraci…ôt intensivliyi</div>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                full_width = FALSE)

# Bar chart ‚ÄĒ yaŇü √ó cins √ó orta m√ľraci…ôt
enc_yas_cins %>%
  group_by(age_group, Cins) %>%
  summarise(`Orta m√ľraci…ôt` = round(mean(enc_say), 1), .groups = "drop") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = age_group, y = `Orta m√ľraci…ôt`, fill = Cins)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge", alpha = 0.88, width = 0.65) +
  geom_text(aes(label = `Orta m√ľraci…ôt`),
            position = position_dodge(0.65), vjust = -0.4,
            size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("QadńĪn" = "#E75480", "KiŇüi" = "#2E75B6")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma,
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  labs(title    = "YaŇü qrupu v…ô cinsl…ôr…ô g√∂r…ô orta m√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ",
       subtitle = "Data toplama d√∂vr√ľ …ôrzind…ô (2010‚Äď2017) h…ôr pasiyentin √ľmumi m√ľraci…ôt sayńĪnńĪn ortalamasńĪ",
       x = "YaŇü qrupu", y = "Orta m√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ", fill = "Cins") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "gray50"))

# Boxplot ‚ÄĒ yaŇü qrupu √ľzr…ô m√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ paylanmasńĪ
enc_yas_cins %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = age_group, y = enc_say, fill = age_group)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.15, outlier.size = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(title    = "YaŇü qrupu √ľzr…ô m√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ paylanmasńĪ",
       subtitle = "Qutu: IQR | X…ôtt: median | N√∂qt…ôl…ôr: outlier-l…ôr",
       x = "YaŇü qrupu", y = "M√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "gray50"))
```

> **Ňě…ôrh:** YaŇü qrupu √ľzr…ô m√ľraci…ôt intensivliyi analizind…ôn
> bir ne√ß…ô …ôh…ômiyy…ôtli n√ľmun…ô ortaya √ßńĪxńĪr. Orta m√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ
> yaŇü artdńĪqca artńĪr ‚ÄĒ bu klinik baxńĪmdan g√∂zl…ônil…ôndir,
> √ß√ľnki yaŇülńĪ pasiyentl…ôr daha √ßox xroniki x…ôst…ôlik daŇüńĪyńĪr
> v…ô daha tez-tez tibbi diqq…ôt t…ôl…ôb edir. 65+ yaŇü qrupunda
> orta m√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ …ôn y√ľks…ôkdir ‚ÄĒ bu qrupun sańülamlńĪq
> sistemini …ôn √ßox y√ľkl…ôy…ôn kateqoriya olduńüunu bir daha
> t…ôsdiql…ôyir. Cins m√ľqayis…ôsind…ô qadńĪnlar 19‚Äď40 yaŇü
> qrupunda kiŇüil…ôrd…ôn …ôh…ômiyy…ôtli d…ôr…ôc…ôd…ô y√ľks…ôk m√ľraci…ôt
> sayńĪ g√∂st…ôrir ‚ÄĒ bu hamil…ôlik m√ľraci…ôtl…ôrinin (Normal
> pregnancy) bu qrupu dominant etm…ôsind…ôn qaynaqlanńĪr.
> Boxplot-dan g√∂r√ľn√ľr ki, h…ôr yaŇü qrupunda g√ľcl√ľ sańüa
> …ôyilmiŇü paylanma var ‚ÄĒ az sayda pasiyent √ßox b√∂y√ľk
> m√ľraci…ôt saylarńĪna √ßatńĪr (outlier-l…ôr), bunlar xroniki
> ańüńĪr x…ôst…ôlikl…ôri olan pasiyentl…ôrdir.



## 1.2 M√ľraci…ôt (Encounter) Analizi

### M√ľraci…ôt n√∂vl…ôrinin tezliyi

```{r encounter_nov, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
enc_nov <- encounters %>%
  count(DESCRIPTION) %>%
  mutate(Faiz = round(100 * n / sum(n), 1)) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  rename(`M√ľraci…ôt n√∂v√ľ` = DESCRIPTION, Say = n)

datatable(enc_nov, caption = "M√ľraci…ôt n√∂vl…ôri √ľzr…ô tezlik",
          rownames = FALSE, filter = "top",
          extensions = c("Buttons", "FixedHeader", "Scroller", "Responsive"),
          options = list(dom = "Bfrtip", pageLength = 10,
                         buttons = list("copy", "print",
                                        list(extend = "collection",
                                             buttons = c("csv", "excel", "pdf"),
                                             text = "Download"))))

enc_nov %>%
  slice_head(n = 8) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(`M√ľraci…ôt n√∂v√ľ`, Say), y = Say)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#2E75B6", alpha = 0.88, width = 0.65) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(Faiz, "%")),
            hjust = -0.15, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma,
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.2))) +
  labs(title    = "∆Źn √ßox rast g…ôlin…ôn m√ľraci…ôt n√∂vl…ôri",
       subtitle = "Top 8 n√∂v, √ľmumi sayńĪn %-i g√∂st…ôrilir",
       x = NULL, y = "M√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "gray50"))
```

> **Ňě…ôrh:** M√ľraci…ôt n√∂vl…ôrinin paylanmasńĪ g√∂st…ôrir ki,
> "Outpatient Encounter" ‚ÄĒ y…ôni ambulatoria m√ľraci…ôti ‚ÄĒ
> 47.3% il…ô m√ľtl…ôq √ľst√ľnl√ľk t…ôŇükil edir. Bu o dem…ôkdir
> ki, h…ôr 2 m√ľraci…ôtd…ôn biri sad…ô ambulatoria ziyar…ôtidir.
> ńįkinci yerd…ô "Encounter for symptom" ‚ÄĒ 15.8% ‚ÄĒ g…ôlir,
> y…ôni pasiyentl…ôr …ôks…ôr hallarda konkret bir Ňüikay…ôtl…ô
> m√ľraci…ôt edirl…ôr. "Emergency room admission" ‚ÄĒ y…ôni
> t…ôcili yardńĪm ‚ÄĒ c…ômi 3.7% t…ôŇükil edir. Bu nisb…ôt
> stakeholderl…ôr √ľ√ß√ľn m√ľsb…ôt siqnaldńĪr: populyasiyanńĪn
> b√∂y√ľk hiss…ôsi x…ôst…ôliyi kritik m…ôrh…ôl…ôy…ô √ßatmadan
> m√ľraci…ôt edir, bu is…ô preventiv tibbinin iŇül…ôdiyini
> g√∂st…ôrir. "Prenatal visit" ‚ÄĒ hamil…ôlik m√ľraci…ôti ‚ÄĒ
> 4.9% il…ô diqq…ôti √ß…ôkir, bu da populyasiyada dońüum
> yaŇüńĪnda qadńĪnlarńĪn aktiv olduńüunu g√∂st…ôrir. √úmumi
> m…ônz…ôr…ô bel…ôdir: bu populyasiya …ôsas…ôn planlaŇüdńĪrńĪlmńĪŇü
> v…ô routine m√ľraci…ôtl…ôr…ô √ľst√ľnl√ľk verir ‚ÄĒ bu is…ô
> sańülamlńĪq savadlńĪlńĪńüńĪnńĪn y√ľks…ôk olduńüunu g√∂st…ôrir.



### Top 10 diaqnoz

```{r top10_diaqnoz, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
top10_diaqnoz <- encounters %>%
  filter(!is.na(REASONDESCRIPTION) & REASONDESCRIPTION != "") %>%
  count(REASONDESCRIPTION) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10) %>%
  mutate(Faiz = round(100 * n /
           nrow(encounters %>%
                  filter(!is.na(REASONDESCRIPTION) &
                           REASONDESCRIPTION != "")), 2)) %>%
  rename(`Diaqnoz / S…ôb…ôb` = REASONDESCRIPTION, Say = n)

kable(top10_diaqnoz, caption = "<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>∆Źn √ßox rast g…ôlin…ôn 10 diaqnoz</div>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)

top10_diaqnoz %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(`Diaqnoz / S…ôb…ôb`, Say), y = Say)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#C0392B", alpha = 0.85, width = 0.65) +
  geom_text(aes(label = scales::comma(Say)),
            hjust = -0.15, size = 3.2, fontface = "bold") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma,
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.22))) +
  labs(title    = "∆Źn √ßox qeyd…ô alńĪnan 10 diaqnoz",
       subtitle = "S…ôb…ôb kodu olan m√ľraci…ôtl…ôr …ôsasńĪnda",
       x = NULL, y = "M√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "gray50"))
```

> **Ňě…ôrh:** ∆Źn √ßox qeyd…ô alńĪnan 10 diaqnoz qrafiki bir ne√ß…ô
> vacib m…ôqamńĪ √ľz…ô √ßńĪxarńĪr. Birinci yerd…ô "Normal pregnancy"
> ‚ÄĒ 85,096 m√ľraci…ôt il…ô ‚ÄĒ g…ôlir. Bu diaqnoz x…ôst…ôlik deyil,
> hamil…ôlik m√ľŇüahid…ôsidir ‚ÄĒ y…ôni m√ľraci…ôtl…ôrin b√∂y√ľk hiss…ôsi
> x…ôst…ôlik yox, profilaktik ziyar…ôtdir. ńįkinci sńĪrada "Viral
> sinusitis" ‚ÄĒ 73,936 m√ľraci…ôt ‚ÄĒ dayanńĪr, bunu "Acute viral
> pharyngitis" v…ô "Acute bronchitis" izl…ôyir. Diqq…ôti √ß…ôk…ôn
> …ôsas m√ľŇüahid…ô budur: top 10 diaqnozun 7-si uŇüaqlńĪq d√∂vr√ľ
> x…ôst…ôlikl…ôri v…ô yuxarńĪ t…ôn…ôff√ľs yolu infeksiyalarńĪdńĪr ‚ÄĒ
> "Child attention deficit disorder", "Otitis media",
> "Childhood asthma" bunlarńĪn arasńĪndadńĪr. Bu o dem…ôkdir ki,
> populyasiyada pediatrik m√ľraci…ôtl…ôr …ôh…ômiyy…ôtli yer tutur.
> Stakeholderl…ôr…ô t√∂vsiy…ô: uŇüaq sańülamlńĪńüńĪ xidm…ôtl…ôri v…ô
> m√∂vs√ľmi infeksiya profilaktikasńĪ (peyv…ônd, gigiyena
> t…ôhsili) bu populyasiya √ľ√ß√ľn prioritet olmalńĪdńĪr.



### ńįllik m√ľraci…ôt trendi

```{r illik_trend, warning=F, error=F, message=F, fig.width=12, fig.height=5}
illik <- encounters %>%
  mutate(il = year(DATE)) %>%
  count(il) %>%
  rename(ńįl = il, Say = n)

illik %>%
  filter(ńįl >= 2010) %>%
  mutate(
    `ArtńĪm (%)` = round(100 * (Say - lag(Say)) / lag(Say), 1),
    `ArtńĪm (%)` = ifelse(is.na(`ArtńĪm (%)`), "‚ÄĒ",
                          paste0(`ArtńĪm (%)`, "%"))
  ) %>%
  mutate(ńįl = as.character(ńįl)) %>%
  kable(caption ="<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>ńįllik m√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ ‚ÄĒ analiz d√∂vr√ľ (2010‚Äď2017)</div>",
        format.args = list(big.mark = ",")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)

p_tam <- ggplot(illik, aes(x = ńįl, y = Say)) +
  geom_line(color = "#2E75B6", linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_point(color = "#2E75B6", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1913, 2017, by = 10)) +
  labs(title = "Tam tarix aralńĪńüńĪ (1913‚Äď2017)",
       x = "ńįl", y = "M√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title  = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

p_son <- illik %>%
  filter(ńįl >= 2010) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = ńįl, y = Say)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#2E75B6", alpha = 0.85, width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = scales::comma(Say)),
            vjust = -0.5, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma,
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2010:2017) +
  labs(title = "Analiz d√∂vr√ľ (2010‚Äď2017)",
       x = "ńįl", y = "M√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title       = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

p_tam + p_son +
  plot_annotation(
    title    = "ńįll…ôr √ľzr…ô m√ľraci…ôt sayńĪnńĪn trendi",
    subtitle = "Sol: tam tarix | Sańü: …ôsas analiz d√∂vr√ľ",
    theme    = theme(
      plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "gray50")
    )
  )

movsumi <- encounters %>%
  mutate(ay = month(DATE, label = TRUE, abbr = TRUE)) %>%
  count(ay) %>%
  rename(Ay = ay, Say = n)

ggplot(movsumi, aes(x = Ay, y = Say, group = 1)) +
  geom_line(color = "#70AD47", linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_point(color = "#70AD47", size = 3) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(title    = "AylńĪq m√∂vs√ľmi trend",
       subtitle = "B√ľt√ľn ill…ôr √ľzr…ô toplam",
       x = "Ay", y = "M√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "gray50"))
```

> **Ňě…ôrh:** ńįllik trend analizi iki f…ôrqli perspektivd…ô
> t…ôqdim edilmiŇüdir. Sol qrafikd…ôn g√∂r√ľn√ľr ki, 1913‚Äď2009
> arasńĪ m√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ dem…ôk olar ki, sńĪfńĪra yaxńĪndńĪr ‚ÄĒ
> datada …ôsl f…ôaliyy…ôt 2010-cu ild…ôn baŇülayńĪr. Bu sintetik
> datanńĪn x√ľsusiyy…ôtidir. Sańü qrafik ‚ÄĒ …ôsas analiz d√∂vr√ľ
> olan 2010‚Äď2017 ‚ÄĒ daha aydńĪn m…ônz…ôr…ô √ß…ôkir: 2010-da
> 107,698 m√ľraci…ôtl…ô baŇülayan sistem 2011-d…ô 177,781-…ô
> k…ôskin artmńĪŇü, sonrakńĪ ill…ôrd…ô ‚ÄĒ 2012-d…ôn 2016-ya q…ôd…ôr
> ‚ÄĒ 178,000‚Äď179,000 aralńĪńüńĪnda sabit qalmńĪŇüdńĪr. Bu sabitlik
> sańülamlńĪq sisteminin yetkin v…ô stabil iŇül…ôdiyini g√∂st…ôrir.
> 2017-d…ô m√ľraci…ôt sayńĪnńĪn 70,692-y…ô d√ľŇüm…ôsi is…ô datanńĪn
> yalnńĪz ilin ilk 5 ayńĪnńĪ …ôhat…ô etm…ôsind…ôn qaynaqlanńĪr ‚ÄĒ
> tam il √ľ√ß√ľn proqnoz 2016-dakńĪ s…ôviyy…ôy…ô yaxńĪn olardńĪ.
> Stakeholderl…ôr √ľ√ß√ľn …ôsas mesaj: sistem 2011-d…ôn etibar…ôn
> ild…ô ~178,000 m√ľraci…ôti daŇüńĪyan stabil bir kapasit…ôy…ô
> √ßatmńĪŇü v…ô bu kapasit…ôni qoruyub saxlamńĪŇüdńĪr.


> **Ňě…ôrh:** AylńĪq m√∂vs√ľmi trend qrafiki m√ľraci…ôt sayńĪnńĪn
> il boyu nec…ô d…ôyiŇüdiyini g√∂st…ôrir. M√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ
> 102,000‚Äď108,000 aralńĪńüńĪnda d…ôyiŇüir ‚ÄĒ bu nisb…ôt…ôn dar
> bir aralńĪqdńĪr, y…ôni g√ľcl√ľ m√∂vs√ľmi dalńüalanma yoxdur.
> Lakin iki …ôh…ômiyy…ôtli m√ľŇüahid…ô var: fevral ayńĪnda
> k…ôskin d√ľŇü√ľŇü (~97,500) m√ľŇüahid…ô edilir ‚ÄĒ bu qism…ôn
> fevralńĪn dig…ôr aylardan az g√ľnl√ľ olmasńĪ il…ô izah edil…ô
> bil…ôr. Mart ayńĪnda is…ô zirv…ô (~108,000) m√ľŇüahid…ô edilir.
> ńįyun ayńĪnda ikinci bir d√ľŇü√ľŇü var ‚ÄĒ yay t…ôtil d√∂vr√ľ il…ô
> …ôlaq…ôli ola bil…ôr. √úmumi m…ônz…ôr…ô g√∂st…ôrir ki, m√∂vs√ľmi
> dalńüalanma minimal s…ôviyy…ôd…ôdir ‚ÄĒ xroniki x…ôst…ôlik
> populyasiyasńĪnda bu normaldńĪr, √ß√ľnki bu pasiyentl…ôr
> m√∂vs√ľmd…ôn asńĪlńĪ olmayaraq m√ľnt…ôz…ôm m√ľraci…ôt edirl…ôr.
> Resurs planlaŇüdńĪrmasńĪ baxńĪmńĪndan: fevral √ľ√ß√ľn minimal,
> mart √ľ√ß√ľn is…ô maksimal tibbi hey…ôt hazńĪrlńĪńüńĪ
> t√∂vsiy…ô edilir.




### X…ôst…ô baŇüńĪna orta m√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ

```{r xeste_basina, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
# H…ôr pasiyentin m√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ
enc_per_patient <- encounters %>% count(PATIENT, name = "enc_say")


# Statistika
enc_stats <- enc_per_patient %>%
  summarise(
    `Orta (Mean)` = round(mean(enc_say), 1),
    `Median`      = round(median(enc_say), 1),
    `Std. k…ônarlaŇüma`  = round(sd(enc_say), 1),
    `Min`         = min(enc_say),
    `Max`         = max(enc_say),
    `IQR`         = round(IQR(enc_say), 1)
  )

kable(enc_stats, caption = "<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>X…ôst…ô baŇüńĪna m√ľraci…ôt sayńĪnńĪn statistikasńĪ</div>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)

ggplot(enc_per_patient, aes(x = enc_say)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, fill = "#5B4DB6", color = "white", alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = mean(enc_per_patient$enc_say),
             color = "#C0392B", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.9) +
  annotate("text", x = mean(enc_per_patient$enc_say) + 3,
           y = Inf, vjust = 2,
           label = paste0("Ort: ", round(mean(enc_per_patient$enc_say), 1)),
           color = "#C0392B", size = 3.8) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(title    = "X…ôst…ô baŇüńĪna m√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ",
       subtitle = "H…ôr s√ľtun 2 m√ľraci…ôtlik aralńĪńüńĪ t…ômsil edir",
       x = "M√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ", y = "Pasiyent sayńĪ") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "gray50"))


# √Ėl√ľm statusu √ľzr…ô orta m√ľraci…ôt m√ľqayis…ôsi

enc_status <- enc_per_patient %>%
  left_join(patients %>% select(ID, DEATHDATE), by = c("PATIENT" = "ID")) %>%
  mutate(Status = ifelse(is.na(DEATHDATE), "Sańü qalan", "V…ôfat etmiŇü"))

enc_status %>%
  group_by(Status) %>%
  summarise(
    `Pasiyent sayńĪ` = n(),
    `Orta m√ľraci…ôt` = round(mean(enc_say), 1),
    `Median`        = round(median(enc_say), 1)
  ) %>%
  kable(caption = "<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>Sańü qalan vs v…ôfat etmiŇü ‚ÄĒ m√ľraci…ôt m√ľqayis…ôsi</div>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)

ggplot(enc_status, aes(x = Status, y = enc_say, fill = Status)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.8, outlier.alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Sańü qalan"    = "#2E75B6",
                                "V…ôfat etmiŇü" = "#C0392B")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(title = "Sańü qalan vs v…ôfat etmiŇü ‚ÄĒ m√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ",
       x = NULL, y = "M√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"))
```

> **Ňě…ôrh:** Bu histoqram h…ôr pasiyentin data toplama d√∂vr√ľ
> …ôrzind…ô ne√ß…ô d…ôf…ô m√ľraci…ôt etdiyini g√∂st…ôrir. Orta m√ľraci…ôt
> sayńĪ 10.7-dir (qńĪrmńĪzńĪ k…ôsik x…ôtt). Paylanma g√ľcl√ľ Ňü…ôkild…ô
> sańüa …ôyilmiŇüdir ‚ÄĒ pasiyentl…ôrin b√∂y√ľk …ôks…ôriyy…ôti 1‚Äď15
> m√ľraci…ôt aralńĪńüńĪndadńĪr, lakin az sayda pasiyent 50, h…ôtta
> 125 m√ľraci…ôt…ô q…ôd…ôr √ßńĪxńĪr. Bu "ańüńĪr istifad…ô√ßil…ôr" ‚ÄĒ
> y…ôni sistemi …ôn √ßox y√ľkl…ôy…ôn pasiyentl…ôr ‚ÄĒ xroniki v…ô
> ańüńĪr x…ôst…ôlikl…ôri olan Ňü…ôxsl…ôrdir. SańülamlńĪq sistemi
> √ľ√ß√ľn vacib bir tapńĪntńĪ: az sayda pasiyent resurslarńĪn
> b√∂y√ľk hiss…ôsini istehlak edir. Bu 80/20 prinsipidir ‚ÄĒ
> pasiyentl…ôrin 20%-i x…ôrcl…ôrin 80%-ini yaradńĪr.
> Stakeholderl…ôr…ô t√∂vsiy…ô: y√ľks…ôk m√ľraci…ôt tezlikli
> pasiyentl…ôr √ľ√ß√ľn x√ľsusi case management proqramlarńĪ
> x…ôrcl…ôri …ôh…ômiyy…ôtli d…ôr…ôc…ôd…ô azalda bil…ôr.

> **Ňě…ôrh:** Bu boxplot iki qrup arasńĪnda m√ľraci…ôt sayńĪnńĪ
> m√ľqayis…ô edir. Sańü qalan pasiyentl…ôrin median m√ľraci…ôt
> sayńĪ v…ôfat etmiŇül…ôrd…ôn …ôh…ômiyy…ôtli d…ôr…ôc…ôd…ô y√ľks…ôkdir.
> Bu ilk baxńĪŇüda t…ô…ôcc√ľbl√ľ g√∂r√ľn…ô bil…ôr ‚ÄĒ amma izahńĪ
> sad…ôdir: sańü qalan pasiyentl…ôr data toplama d√∂vr√ľ
> boyunca (2010‚Äď2017) tam 7 il m√ľraci…ôt etmiŇül…ôr.
> V…ôfat etmiŇü pasiyentl…ôr is…ô m√ľ…ôyy…ôn bir n√∂qt…ôd…ô
> h…ôyatńĪnńĪ itirdiyi √ľ√ß√ľn daha az m√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ
> toplayńĪblar. BaŇüqa s√∂zl…ô: daha uzun yaŇüayan =
> daha √ßox m√ľraci…ôt. Sańü qalanlarda outlier-l…ôrin
> (125-…ô q…ôd…ôr) daha √ßox olmasńĪ da bunu t…ôsdiql…ôyir.
> Bu analiz g√∂st…ôrir ki, m√ľraci…ôt sayńĪnńĪ xam Ňü…ôkild…ô
> m√ľqayis…ô etm…ôk yanńĪltńĪcńĪ ola bil…ôr ‚ÄĒ vaxt faktoru
> m√ľtl…ôq n…ôz…ôr…ô alńĪnmalńĪdńĪr.


### X…ôst…ôlik ~ YaŇü …ôlaq…ôsi ‚ÄĒ hansńĪ x…ôst…ôlik hansńĪ yaŇü qrupunda daha √ßoxdur

```{r xestelik_yas, warning=F, error=F, message=F}

# H…ôr yaŇü qrupunda top 5 diaqnoz

xestelik_yas <- encounters %>%
  filter(!is.na(REASONDESCRIPTION) & REASONDESCRIPTION != "") %>%
  left_join(patients %>% select(ID, age_group),
            by = c("PATIENT" = "ID")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(age_group)) %>%
  count(age_group, REASONDESCRIPTION) %>%
  group_by(age_group) %>%
  slice_max(n, n = 5) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  rename(`YaŇü qrupu` = age_group,
         `Diaqnoz`   = REASONDESCRIPTION,
         `Say`       = n)

kable(xestelik_yas,
      caption = "<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>H…ôr yaŇü qrupunda top 5 diaqnoz</div>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                full_width = TRUE) %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%")

# Vizual ‚ÄĒ top 3 diaqnoz h…ôr yaŇü qrupu √ľ√ß√ľn
xestelik_yas_plot <- encounters %>%
  filter(!is.na(REASONDESCRIPTION) & REASONDESCRIPTION != "") %>%
  left_join(patients %>% select(ID, age_group),
            by = c("PATIENT" = "ID")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(age_group)) %>%
  count(age_group, REASONDESCRIPTION) %>%
  group_by(age_group) %>%
  slice_max(n, n = 3) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(xestelik_yas_plot,
       aes(x = reorder(REASONDESCRIPTION, n),
           y = n, fill = age_group)) +
  geom_col(alpha = 0.88, width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = scales::comma(n)),
            hjust = -0.15, size = 3, fontface = "bold") +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(~age_group, scales = "free", ncol = 2) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma,
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.25))) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(title    = "YaŇü qrupu √ľzr…ô top 3 diaqnoz",
       subtitle = "H…ôr yaŇü qrupunda …ôn √ßox rast g…ôlin…ôn x…ôst…ôlikl…ôr",
       x = NULL, y = "M√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "gray50"),
        strip.text    = element_text(face = "bold"))
```

> **Ňě…ôrh:** (H…ôr yaŇü qrupunda top 5 diaqnoz) H…ôr yaŇü qrupu √ľzr…ô top 5 diaqnoz c…ôdv…ôli
> maraqlńĪ bir n√ľmun…ô ortaya qoyur: viral sinusitis,
> acute pharyngitis v…ô acute bronchitis ‚ÄĒ y…ôni yuxarńĪ
> t…ôn…ôff√ľs yolu infeksiyalarńĪ ‚ÄĒ b√ľt√ľn yaŇü qruplarńĪnda
> top siyahńĪda yer alńĪr. Bu g√∂st…ôrir ki, infeksion
> x…ôst…ôlikl…ôr populyasiyanńĪn h…ôr k…ôsini eyni d…ôr…ôc…ôd…ô
> …ôhat…ô edir. Lakin h…ôr yaŇü qrupuna xas f…ôrql…ôr d…ô
> var: 0‚Äď18 yaŇü qrupunda otitis media (qulaq iltihabńĪ)
> v…ô child attention deficit disorder (ADHD) uŇüaqlńĪńüa
> xas v…ôziyy…ôtl…ôr kimi √∂ne √ßńĪxńĪr. 19‚Äď40 yaŇü qrupunda
> normal pregnancy ‚ÄĒ hamil…ôlik m√ľŇüahid…ôsi ‚ÄĒ 72,388
> m√ľraci…ôtl…ô birinci yerd…ôdir, bu dońüum yaŇüńĪnda olan
> qadńĪnlarńĪn aktiv olduńüunu g√∂st…ôrir. 65+ yaŇü qrupunda
> is…ô dig…ôr qruplarda g√∂r√ľnm…ôy…ôn Alzheimer's disease
> ‚ÄĒ 1,835 m√ľraci…ôtl…ô ‚ÄĒ siyahńĪya daxil olur. Bu
> tapńĪntńĪ kritik bir mesaj verir: yaŇülńĪ populyasiya
> √ľ√ß√ľn neyroloji x…ôst…ôlikl…ôr…ô y√∂n…ôlik x√ľsusi qayńüńĪ
> proqramlarńĪ z…ôruridir. √úmumi n…ôtic…ô: profilaktik
> tibb yaŇü qrupuna g√∂r…ô f…ôrql…ôndirilm…ôlidir ‚ÄĒ
> uŇüaqlar √ľ√ß√ľn infeksiya v…ô inkiŇüaf, g…ôncl…ôr √ľ√ß√ľn
> reproduktiv sańülamlńĪq, yaŇülńĪlar √ľ√ß√ľn neyroloji
> qayńüńĪ prioritet olmalńĪdńĪr.


> **Ňě…ôrh:** (Vizual ‚ÄĒ top 3 diaqnoz h…ôr yaŇü qrupu √ľ√ß√ľn) Bu qrafik 4 yaŇü qrupunu eyni anda m√ľqayis…ô
> etm…ôy…ô imkan verir. H…ôr panelin √∂z oxu var ‚ÄĒ ona g√∂r…ô
> m√ľtl…ôq r…ôq…ôml…ôr…ô diqq…ôt etm…ôk lazńĪmdńĪr. 0‚Äď18 yaŇü
> qrupunda viral sinusitis (12,855) birinci yerd…ôdir,
> onu otitis media (9,773) v…ô ADHD (8,451) izl…ôyir ‚ÄĒ
> bu √ľ√ß√ľ uŇüaqlńĪńüa xas klassik v…ôziyy…ôtl…ôrdir. 19‚Äď40
> yaŇü qrupunda m…ônz…ôr…ô k…ôskin d…ôyiŇüir: normal pregnancy
> (72,388) il…ô dig…ôr diaqnozlarńĪ tamamil…ô √ľst…ôl…ôyir ‚ÄĒ
> bu r…ôq…ôm 19‚Äď40 qrupunun reproduktiv yaŇü olduńüunu
> g√∂st…ôrir. 41‚Äď65 yaŇü qrupunda is…ô t…ôn…ôff√ľs yolu
> infeksiyalarńĪ (viral sinusitis 26,232, pharyngitis
> 14,720, bronchitis 12,145) dominantdńĪr ‚ÄĒ hamil…ôlik
> artńĪq siyahńĪdan √ßńĪxmańüa baŇülayńĪr. 65+ yaŇü qrupunda
> da eyni 3 infeksiya x…ôst…ôliyi g√∂r√ľn√ľr, lakin saylar
> …ôh…ômiyy…ôtli d…ôr…ôc…ôd…ô aŇüańüńĪdńĪr ‚ÄĒ bu qrupun √ľmumi
> m√ľraci…ôt sayńĪnńĪn az olmasńĪ il…ô bańülńĪdńĪr. MaraqlńĪ
> bir m√ľŇüahid…ô: Alzheimer's disease bu vizualda
> g√∂r√ľnm√ľr ‚ÄĒ √ß√ľnki yalnńĪz top 3 g√∂t√ľr√ľl√ľb, o 4-c√ľ
> v…ô 5-ci yerd…ôdir. √úmumi n…ôtic…ô: t…ôn…ôff√ľs yolu
> infeksiyalarńĪ b√ľt√ľn yaŇü qruplarńĪnda universal
> problemdir, h…ôr yaŇü qrupuna spesifik sańülamlńĪq
> m√ľdaxil…ôl…ôri is…ô ayrńĪca planlaŇüdńĪrńĪlmalńĪdńĪr.





### X…ôst…ôlik ~ Cins …ôlaq…ôsi ‚ÄĒ kiŇüi vs qadńĪn diaqnoz profili

```{r xestelik_cins, warning=F, error=F, message=F}

# KiŇüi v…ô qadńĪn √ľ√ß√ľn top 10 diaqnoz
xestelik_cins <- encounters %>%
  filter(!is.na(REASONDESCRIPTION) & REASONDESCRIPTION != "") %>%
  left_join(patients %>% select(ID, GENDER),
            by = c("PATIENT" = "ID")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(GENDER)) %>%
  mutate(Cins = ifelse(GENDER == "F", "QadńĪn", "KiŇüi")) %>%
  count(Cins, REASONDESCRIPTION) %>%
  group_by(Cins) %>%
  slice_max(n, n = 10) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  rename(`Diaqnoz` = REASONDESCRIPTION, `Say` = n)

kable(xestelik_cins,
      caption = "<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>Cins √ľzr…ô top 10 diaqnoz</div>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                full_width = FALSE) %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%")

# Vizual ‚ÄĒ top 8 diaqnoz kiŇüi vs qadńĪn
xestelik_cins %>%
  group_by(Cins) %>%
  slice_max(Say, n = 8) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(Diaqnoz, Say),
             y = Say, fill = Cins)) +
  geom_col(alpha = 0.88, width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = scales::comma(Say)),
            hjust = -0.15, size = 3, fontface = "bold") +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(~Cins, scales = "free_x", ncol = 2) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma,
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.25))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("QadńĪn" = "#E75480",
                                "KiŇüi"  = "#2E75B6")) +
  labs(title    = "Cins √ľzr…ô top 8 diaqnoz m√ľqayis…ôsi",
       subtitle = "KiŇüi v…ô qadńĪnlarda …ôn √ßox rast g…ôlin…ôn x…ôst…ôlikl…ôr",
       x = NULL, y = "M√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "gray50"),
        strip.text    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12))
```

> **Ňě…ôrh:** Bu qrafik kiŇüi v…ô qadńĪn diaqnoz profill…ôrini
> yan-yana m√ľqayis…ô etm…ôy…ô imkan verir. ∆Źn diqq…ôt√ß…ôkici
> f…ôrq qadńĪn panelind…ôdir ‚ÄĒ "Normal pregnancy" 85,096
> m√ľraci…ôtl…ô m√ľtl…ôq birinci yerd…ôdir v…ô dig…ôr b√ľt√ľn
> diaqnozlarńĪ k…ôskin Ňü…ôkild…ô √ľst…ôl…ôyir. KiŇüil…ôrd…ô is…ô
> hamil…ôlik olmadńĪńüńĪndan bu diaqnoz g√∂r√ľnm√ľr. MaraqlńĪ
> m√ľŇüahid…ô: kiŇüil…ôrd…ô "Child attention deficit disorder"
> ‚ÄĒ ADHD ‚ÄĒ 8,210 il…ô top siyahńĪda yer alńĪr, qadńĪnlarda
> is…ô bu diaqnoz g√∂r√ľnm√ľr. AraŇüdńĪrmalar g√∂st…ôrir ki,
> ADHD ońülanlarda qńĪzlardan 2‚Äď3 d…ôf…ô daha √ßox diaqnoz
> qoyulur ‚ÄĒ bu qrafik h…ômin klinik reallńĪńüńĪ …ôks etdirir.
> T…ôn…ôff√ľs yolu infeksiyalarńĪ ‚ÄĒ viral sinusitis,
> pharyngitis, bronchitis ‚ÄĒ h…ôr iki cinsd…ô dem…ôk olar
> ki, eyni nisb…ôtd…ô g√∂r√ľn√ľr, r…ôq…ôml…ôr arasńĪnda minimal
> f…ôrq var. Asthma v…ô otitis media da h…ôr iki cinsd…ô
> oxŇüar paylanma g√∂st…ôrir. √úmumi n…ôtic…ô: cins √ľzr…ô
> x…ôst…ôlik profili …ôsas…ôn oxŇüardńĪr, lakin iki kritik
> f…ôrq var ‚ÄĒ qadńĪnlarda reproduktiv sańülamlńĪq m√ľraci…ôtl…ôri
> dominant m√∂vqe tutur, kiŇüil…ôrd…ô is…ô neyroinkiŇüaf
> pozńüunluqlarńĪ (ADHD) daha √ßox diaqnoz qoyulur.
> Bu f…ôrql…ôr cinsl…ôr…ô spesifik sańülamlńĪq proqramlarńĪnńĪn
> z…ôruriliyini bir daha t…ôsdiql…ôyir.



### √Ėl√ľm ~ X…ôst…ôlik …ôlaq…ôsi ‚ÄĒ hansńĪ diaqnozla g…ôl…ôn pasiyentl…ôr daha √ßox v…ôfat edib

```{r olum_xestelik, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
# H…ôr diaqnoz √ľ√ß√ľn √∂l√ľm nisb…ôti
olum_xestelik <- encounters %>%
  filter(!is.na(REASONDESCRIPTION) & REASONDESCRIPTION != "") %>%
  left_join(patients %>% select(ID, DEATHDATE),
            by = c("PATIENT" = "ID")) %>%
  mutate(vefat = as.integer(!is.na(DEATHDATE))) %>%
  group_by(REASONDESCRIPTION) %>%
  summarise(
    `√úmumi m√ľraci…ôt` = n(),
    `V…ôfat ed…ôn`     = sum(vefat),
    `√Ėl√ľm nisb…ôti %` = round(100 * sum(vefat) / n(), 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(`√úmumi m√ľraci…ôt` >= 500) %>%
  arrange(desc(`√Ėl√ľm nisb…ôti %`)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 15) %>%
  rename(`Diaqnoz` = REASONDESCRIPTION)

kable(olum_xestelik,
      caption = "<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>Diaqnoz √ľzr…ô √∂l√ľm nisb…ôti ‚ÄĒ top 15 (min 500 m√ľraci…ôt)</div>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                full_width = FALSE) %>%
  row_spec(1:3, background = "#FCEBEB") %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%")

# Vizual
olum_xestelik %>%
  slice_head(n = 10) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(Diaqnoz, `√Ėl√ľm nisb…ôti %`),
             y = `√Ėl√ľm nisb…ôti %`)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#C0392B", alpha = 0.85, width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(`√Ėl√ľm nisb…ôti %`, "%")),
            hjust = -0.15, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  labs(title    = "∆Źn y√ľks…ôk √∂l√ľm nisb…ôtin…ô malik diaqnozlar",
       subtitle = "Minimum 500 m√ľraci…ôti olan diaqnozlar …ôsasńĪnda ‚ÄĒ top 10",
       x = NULL, y = "√Ėl√ľm nisb…ôti (%)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "gray50"))
```

> **Ňě…ôrh:** Bu qrafik layih…ônin …ôn kritik klinik tapńĪntńĪsńĪnńĪ
> ortaya qoyur ‚ÄĒ hansńĪ diaqnozla m√ľraci…ôt ed…ôn pasiyentl…ôr
> …ôn y√ľks…ôk √∂l√ľm riski daŇüńĪyńĪr. Birinci yerd…ô "Primary
> small cell malignant neoplasm of lung TNM stage 4" ‚ÄĒ
> y…ôni ańüciy…ôr x…ôr√ß…ônginin …ôn ańüńĪr m…ôrh…ôl…ôsi ‚ÄĒ 94.8%
> √∂l√ľm nisb…ôti il…ô dayanńĪr. Bu o dem…ôkdir ki, bu
> diaqnozla m√ľraci…ôt ed…ôn h…ôr 100 pasiyentd…ôn 95-i
> data toplama d√∂vr√ľ …ôrzind…ô v…ôfat etmiŇüdir. ńįkinci
> v…ô √ľ√ß√ľnc√ľ yerd…ô "Suspected lung cancer" (80.6%) v…ô
> "Non-small cell lung cancer" (80.4%) ‚ÄĒ y…ôni ańüciy…ôr
> x…ôr√ß…ônginin dig…ôr n√∂vl…ôri ‚ÄĒ g…ôlir. Bu √ľ√ß diaqnoz
> birlikd…ô g√∂st…ôrir ki, ańüciy…ôr x…ôr√ß…ôngi bu populyasiyada
> …ôn √∂l√ľmc√ľl x…ôst…ôlikdir. D√∂rd√ľnc√ľ yerd…ô "Alzheimer's
> disease" 47.8% il…ô yer alńĪr ‚ÄĒ bu yaŇülńĪ populyasiyada
> g√∂zl…ônil…ôn n…ôtic…ôdir. MaraqlńĪ bir m√ľŇüahid…ô: "Drug
> overdose" ‚ÄĒ d…ôrman h…ôddind…ôn artńĪq q…ôbulu ‚ÄĒ 9.6%
> √∂l√ľm nisb…ôti il…ô siyahńĪdadńĪr. Bu sintetik datada
> bel…ô g√∂r√ľn√ľrs…ô, real populyasiyada bu r…ôq…ôm daha
> y√ľks…ôk ola bil…ôr. "Closed fracture of hip" ‚ÄĒ y…ôni
> bud s√ľm√ľy√ľ qńĪrńĪńüńĪ ‚ÄĒ 11% √∂l√ľm nisb…ôti il…ô diqq…ôti
> √ß…ôkir. Bu yaŇülńĪ pasiyentl…ôrd…ô bud qńĪrńĪńüńĪnńĪn n…ô
> q…ôd…ôr ciddi f…ôsadlara yol a√ßdńĪńüńĪnńĪ g√∂st…ôrir ‚ÄĒ
> …ôm…ôliyyat sonrasńĪ ańüńĪrlaŇümalar √∂l√ľm riskini
> k…ôskin artńĪrńĪr. Ańüciy…ôr x…ôr√ß…ônginin erk…ôn aŇükarlanmasńĪ proqramlarńĪ,
> Alzheimer x…ôst…ôl…ôri √ľ√ß√ľn palliativ qayńüńĪ v…ô
> yaŇülńĪlarda d√ľŇüm…ô profilaktikasńĪ proqramlarńĪ
> bu populyasiyada √∂l√ľm nisb…ôtini …ôh…ômiyy…ôtli
> d…ôr…ôc…ôd…ô azalda bil…ôr.


### M√∂vs√ľmi x…ôst…ôlik trendi ‚ÄĒ hansńĪ x…ôst…ôlikl…ôr hansńĪ ayda artńĪr

```{r movsumi_xestelik, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
# Top 5 x…ôst…ôlik √ľzr…ô aylńĪq trend
top5_diaqnoz <- encounters %>%
  filter(!is.na(REASONDESCRIPTION) & REASONDESCRIPTION != "") %>%
  count(REASONDESCRIPTION) %>%
  slice_max(n, n = 5) %>%
  pull(REASONDESCRIPTION)

movsumi_xestelik <- encounters %>%
  filter(REASONDESCRIPTION %in% top5_diaqnoz) %>%
  mutate(ay = month(DATE, label = TRUE, abbr = TRUE)) %>%
  count(ay, REASONDESCRIPTION) %>%
  rename(Ay = ay, Diaqnoz = REASONDESCRIPTION, Say = n)

kable(movsumi_xestelik %>%
        pivot_wider(names_from = Ay, values_from = Say),
      caption = "<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>Top 5 diaqnoz √ľzr…ô aylńĪq m√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ</div>" ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                full_width = TRUE) %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%")

ggplot(movsumi_xestelik,
       aes(x = Ay, y = Say,
           color = Diaqnoz, group = Diaqnoz)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  labs(title    = "Top 5 diaqnoz √ľzr…ô m√∂vs√ľmi trend",
       subtitle = "AylńĪq m√ľraci…ôt sayńĪnńĪn d…ôyiŇüimi",
       x = "Ay", y = "M√ľraci…ôt sayńĪ",
       color = "Diaqnoz") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "gray50"),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.text   = element_text(size = 9))
```

> **Ňě…ôrh:** Bu qrafik 5 …ôsas diaqnozun il boyu nec…ô
> d…ôyiŇüdiyini eyni anda g√∂st…ôrir. H…ôr x…ôtt bir diaqnozu
> t…ômsil edir. ∆Źn yuxarńĪda b…ôn√∂vŇü…ôyi x…ôtt ‚ÄĒ Normal
> pregnancy ‚ÄĒ il boyu …ôn y√ľks…ôk v…ô …ôn sabit x…ôttdir.
> Hamil…ôlik m√ľraci…ôtl…ôrinin m√∂vs√ľmi dalńüalanmasńĪ
> minimaldńĪr ‚ÄĒ bu g√∂zl…ônil…ôndir, √ß√ľnki hamil…ôlik
> m√∂vs√ľmd…ôn asńĪlńĪ deyil. NarńĪncńĪ x…ôtt ‚ÄĒ Viral
> sinusitis ‚ÄĒ …ôn g√ľcl√ľ m√∂vs√ľmi dalńüalanma g√∂st…ôrir:
> yanvarda y√ľks…ôk baŇülayńĪr, fevralda d√ľŇü√ľr, martda
> zirv…ôy…ô √ßatńĪr, sonra yenid…ôn azalńĪr. Bu klassik
> qńĪŇü-yaz ke√ßid d√∂vr√ľ infeksiya dalńüasńĪdńĪr. Mavi
> x…ôtt ‚ÄĒ Acute viral pharyngitis ‚ÄĒ oxŇüar dalńüalanma
> g√∂st…ôrir, martda zirv…ô m√ľŇüahid…ô edilir. QńĪrmńĪzńĪ
> x…ôtt ‚ÄĒ Acute bronchitis ‚ÄĒ nisb…ôt…ôn sabit qalńĪr,
> lakin martda ki√ßik zirv…ô var. YaŇüńĪl x…ôtt ‚ÄĒ Asthma
> ‚ÄĒ il boyu …ôn aŇüańüńĪ v…ô …ôn sabit x…ôttdir, m√∂vs√ľmi
> t…ôsir dem…ôk olar ki, yoxdur. √úmumi n…ôtic…ô:
> infeksion x…ôst…ôlikl…ôr √ľ√ß√ľn mart ayńĪ kritik
> zirv…ô n√∂qt…ôsidir ‚ÄĒ bu ayda tibbi resurslar,
> d…ôrman ehtiyatńĪ v…ô tibb hey…ôti …ôn y√ľks…ôk
> hazńĪrlńĪqda olmalńĪdńĪr. Fevral d√ľŇü√ľŇü√ľ is…ô
> qism…ôn bu ayńĪn qńĪsa olmasńĪ il…ô izah edilir.



### BMI ~ X…ôst…ôlik …ôlaq…ôsi ‚ÄĒ y√ľks…ôk BMI-li pasiyentl…ôr hansńĪ x…ôst…ôlikl…ôr…ô daha √ßox m…ôruz qalńĪr

```{r bmi_xestelik, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
# H…ôr pasiyent √ľ√ß√ľn orta BMI
bmi_per_patient <- obs_numeric %>%
  filter(DESCRIPTION == "Body Mass Index") %>%
  group_by(PATIENT) %>%
  summarise(BMI = mean(value_num, na.rm = T), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(bmi_group = case_when(
    BMI < 18.5 ~ "ArńĪq (<18.5)",
    BMI < 25   ~ "Normal (18.5‚Äď25)",
    BMI < 30   ~ "ArtńĪq √ß…ôkili (25‚Äď30)",
    TRUE       ~ "Obez (>30)"
  ))

# BMI qrupu √ľzr…ô top 5 diaqnoz
bmi_xestelik <- encounters %>%
  filter(!is.na(REASONDESCRIPTION) & REASONDESCRIPTION != "") %>%
  left_join(bmi_per_patient, by = c("PATIENT")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(bmi_group)) %>%
  count(bmi_group, REASONDESCRIPTION) %>%
  group_by(bmi_group) %>%
  slice_max(n, n = 5) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  rename(`BMI qrupu` = bmi_group,
         `Diaqnoz`   = REASONDESCRIPTION,
         `Say`       = n)

kable(bmi_xestelik,
      caption = "<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>BMI qrupu √ľzr…ô top 5 diaqnoz</div>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                full_width = TRUE) %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%")

# BMI qrupu paylanmasńĪ
bmi_per_patient %>%
  count(bmi_group) %>%
  mutate(Faiz = round(100 * n / sum(n), 1),
         bmi_group = factor(bmi_group,
                            levels = c("ArńĪq (<18.5)",
                                       "Normal (18.5‚Äď25)",
                                       "ArtńĪq √ß…ôkili (25‚Äď30)",
                                       "Obez (>30)"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = bmi_group, y = n, fill = bmi_group)) +
  geom_col(alpha = 0.88, width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(Faiz, "%")),
            vjust = -0.5, size = 4, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "ArńĪq (<18.5)"        = "#3498DB",
    "Normal (18.5‚Äď25)"    = "#2ECC71",
    "ArtńĪq √ß…ôkili (25‚Äď30)" = "#F39C12",
    "Obez (>30)"          = "#C0392B"
  )) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma,
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.12))) +
  labs(title    = "Pasiyentl…ôrin BMI qrupu √ľzr…ô paylanmasńĪ",
       subtitle = "H…ôr s√ľtunun √ľst√ľnd…ô faiz g√∂st…ôrilir",
       x = NULL, y = "Pasiyent sayńĪ") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "gray50"))
```

> **Ňě…ôrh:** Bu qrafik layih…ônin …ôn narahatedici tapńĪntńĪlarńĪndan
> birini vizual olaraq g√∂st…ôrir. Pasiyentl…ôrin yarńĪsńĪ ‚ÄĒ
> 49.8%-i ‚ÄĒ obez kateqoriyasńĪndadńĪr (BMI > 30). Y…ôni
> h…ôr 2 pasiyentd…ôn biri klinik olaraq obezdir. Normal
> BMI aralńĪńüńĪnda (18.5‚Äď25) is…ô c…ômi 18.3% var ‚ÄĒ bu
> o dem…ôkdir ki, populyasiyanńĪn yalnńĪz 5-d…ôn 1-i
> sańülam √ß…ôki normalarńĪna uyńüundur. ArtńĪq √ß…ôkili
> (25‚Äď30) qrupu 16.4%, arńĪq qrupu is…ô 15.5% t…ôŇükil
> edir. ArńĪq qrupun bu q…ôd…ôr y√ľks…ôk olmasńĪ da
> diqq…ôti √ß…ôkir ‚ÄĒ bu qrup da sańülamlńĪq riski
> daŇüńĪyńĪr, √ß√ľnki aŇüańüńĪ BMI s√ľm√ľk sńĪxlńĪńüńĪnńĪn
> azalmasńĪ, immunitetin z…ôifl…ôm…ôsi il…ô bańülńĪdńĪr.
> √úmumi m…ônz…ôr…ô a√ßńĪqdńĪr: populyasiyanńĪn 66.2%-i ‚ÄĒ
> y…ôni obez v…ô artńĪq √ß…ôkili qruplar birlikd…ô ‚ÄĒ
> sańülam √ß…ôki normalarńĪndan k…ônardadńĪr. Bu r…ôq…ôm
> ABŇě-ńĪn real populyasiya statistikasńĪ il…ô
> √ľst-√ľst…ô d√ľŇü√ľr ‚ÄĒ sintetik datanńĪn reallńĪńüńĪ
> n…ô q…ôd…ôr yaxŇüńĪ …ôks etdirdiyini g√∂st…ôrir.
> Stakeholderl…ôr…ô t√∂vsiy…ô: √ß…ôki idar…ôetm…ô
> proqramlarńĪ, qidalanma t…ôhsili v…ô fiziki
> aktivlik m√ľdaxil…ôl…ôri bu populyasiyanńĪn
> sańülamlńĪq y√ľk√ľn√ľ azaltmaq √ľ√ß√ľn …ôn prioritet
> sah…ôl…ôrdir ‚ÄĒ √ß√ľnki obezlik yuxarńĪda g√∂rd√ľy√ľm√ľz
> hipertenziya, diabet, √ľr…ôk x…ôst…ôlikl…ôri kimi
> xroniki v…ôziyy…ôtl…ôrin …ôsas risk faktoru kimi
> √ßńĪxńĪŇü edir.



### X…ôst…ôlik n√∂v√ľ analizi ‚ÄĒ k…ôskin vs xroniki vs hamil…ôlik

```{r xestelik_nov_analizi, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
# Encounters-d…ôki REASONDESCRIPTION s√ľtunu x…ôst…ôlik adlarńĪnńĪ saxlayńĪr.
# X…ôst…ôlikl…ôri klinik kateqoriyalara ayńĪraq:
# 1) Hamil…ôlik/reproduktiv  2) K…ôskin infeksion  3) Xroniki  4) Dig…ôr

xestelik_kategoriya <- encounters %>%
  filter(!is.na(REASONDESCRIPTION) & REASONDESCRIPTION != "") %>%
  mutate(
    Kateqoriya = case_when(
      str_detect(REASONDESCRIPTION,
        regex("pregnancy|prenatal|postpartum|obstetric|labor|birth|gravid",
              ignore_case = TRUE))                                       ~ "Hamil…ôlik / Reproduktiv",
      str_detect(REASONDESCRIPTION,
        regex("sinusitis|pharyngitis|bronchitis|otitis|influenza|viral|bacterial|infection|cold|strep|rhinitis|covid",
              ignore_case = TRUE))                                       ~ "K…ôskin ńįnfeksion",
      str_detect(REASONDESCRIPTION,
        regex("asthma|diabetes|hypertension|obesity|alzheimer|chronic|COPD|heart|cardiac|cancer|neoplasm|tumor|depression|anxiety|arthritis|fibromyalgia|epilepsy|stroke|renal|kidney",
              ignore_case = TRUE))                                       ~ "Xroniki / AńüńĪr",
      str_detect(REASONDESCRIPTION,
        regex("fracture|injury|wound|burn|trauma|overdose|poisoning|accident",
              ignore_case = TRUE))                                       ~ "Travma / Z…ôd…ô",
      TRUE                                                               ~ "Dig…ôr"
    )
  ) %>%
  count(Kateqoriya) %>%
  mutate(Faiz = round(100 * n / sum(n), 1)) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  rename(Say = n)

kable(xestelik_kategoriya,
      caption = "<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>X…ôst…ôlik kateqoriyalarńĪ √ľzr…ô m√ľraci…ôt paylanmasńĪ</div>",
      format.args = list(big.mark = ",")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)

# Pie chart
xestelik_kategoriya %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = "", y = Say, fill = Kateqoriya)) +
  geom_col(width = 1, color = "white", linewidth = 0.5) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(Faiz, "%")),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            size = 4, fontface = "bold", color = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Hamil…ôlik / Reproduktiv" = "#E75480",
    "K…ôskin ńįnfeksion"        = "#2E75B6",
    "Xroniki / AńüńĪr"          = "#C0392B",
    "Travma / Z…ôd…ô"           = "#E67E22",
    "Dig…ôr"                   = "#BDC3C7"
  )) +
  labs(title = "M√ľraci…ôtl…ôrin klinik kateqoriyalar √ľzr…ô paylanmasńĪ",
       x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = "Kateqoriya") +
  theme_void(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        legend.position = "right")
```

> **Ňě…ôrh:** X…ôst…ôlik kateqoriyalarńĪ analizi m√ľraci…ôtl…ôrin klinik
> mahiyy…ôtini a√ßńĪqlayńĪr. K…ôskin infeksion x…ôst…ôlikl…ôr
> (viral sinusitis, farenjit, bronxit, otit) …ôn b√∂y√ľk kateqoriyanńĪ
> t…ôŇükil edir ‚ÄĒ bu m√∂vs√ľmi infeksiyalarńĪn populyasiyanńĪn h…ôr yaŇü
> qrupunu eyni d…ôr…ôc…ôd…ô …ôhat…ô etdiyini g√∂st…ôrir. Hamil…ôlik /
> reproduktiv kateqoriya …ôh…ômiyy…ôtli pay tutur ‚ÄĒ bu populyasiyada
> dońüum yaŇüńĪnda olan qadńĪnlarńĪn f…ôal olduńüunu bir daha s√ľbut edir.
> Xroniki / ańüńĪr x…ôst…ôlikl…ôr ‚ÄĒ diabet, hipertenziya, x…ôr√ß…ông,
> Alzheimer ‚ÄĒ faiz baxńĪmńĪndan az g√∂r√ľns…ô d…ô, bu qrupun sistemi
> …ôn √ßox y√ľkl…ôy…ôn kateqoriya olduńüu m√ľraci…ôt intensivliyi
> analizind…ôn m…ôlumdur. Travma / z…ôd…ô kateqoriyasńĪ …ôn az paya
> sahibdir ‚ÄĒ bu preventiv tibb sisteminin iŇül…ôdiyinin …ôlam…ôtidir.



### Observations ‚ÄĒ klinik √∂l√ßm…ô n√∂vl…ôri n…ô q…ôd…ôrdir?

```{r obs_description_analiz, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
# Observations c…ôdv…ôlind…ôki DESCRIPTION s√ľtunu n…ô q…ôd…ôr f…ôrqli
# klinik √∂l√ßm…ô n√∂v√ľ saxlayńĪr? HansńĪ √∂l√ßm…ôl…ôr daha √ßoxdur?

obs_desc_count <- observations %>%
  filter(!is.na(DESCRIPTION) & DESCRIPTION != "") %>%
  count(DESCRIPTION, UNITS) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  mutate(Faiz = round(100 * n / sum(n), 2))

cat("Observations c…ôdv…ôlind…ôki unikal DESCRIPTION sayńĪ:",
    n_distinct(observations$DESCRIPTION), "\n")
cat("R…ôq…ômsal √∂l√ßm…ô n√∂v√ľ (obs_numeric):",
    n_distinct(obs_numeric$DESCRIPTION), "\n")
cat("Kategorik √∂l√ßm…ô n√∂v√ľ (obs_categorical):",
    n_distinct(obs_categorical$DESCRIPTION), "\n")

# Top 15 …ôn √ßox √∂l√ß√ľl…ôn g√∂st…ôrici
obs_desc_count %>%
  slice_head(n = 15) %>%
  rename(`Klinik g√∂st…ôrici` = DESCRIPTION, Vahid = UNITS, Say = n) %>%
  kable(caption = "<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>∆Źn √ßox √∂l√ß√ľl…ôn 15 klinik g√∂st…ôrici ‚ÄĒ observations c…ôdv…ôli</div>",
        format.args = list(big.mark = ",")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                full_width = TRUE) %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%")

# Bar chart ‚ÄĒ top 12
obs_desc_count %>%
  slice_head(n = 12) %>%
  mutate(DESCRIPTION = str_trunc(DESCRIPTION, 45)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(DESCRIPTION, n), y = n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#2E75B6", alpha = 0.88, width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = scales::comma(n)),
            hjust = -0.1, size = 3.2, fontface = "bold") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma,
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.2))) +
  labs(title    = "Observations ‚ÄĒ …ôn √ßox qeyd…ô alńĪnan 12 klinik g√∂st…ôrici",
       subtitle = paste0("C…ômi ", scales::comma(nrow(observations)),
                         " √∂l√ßm…ô | ", n_distinct(observations$DESCRIPTION),
                         " unikal g√∂st…ôrici"),
       x = NULL, y = "√Ėl√ßm…ô sayńĪ") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "gray50"))
```

> **Ňě…ôrh:** Observations c…ôdv…ôlind…ôki unikal klinik g√∂st…ôrici
> sayńĪ sańülamlńĪq sisteminin monitorinq geniŇüliyini g√∂st…ôrir.
> ∆Źn √ßox √∂l√ß√ľl…ôn g√∂st…ôricil…ôr boy, √ß…ôki, BMI, qan t…ôzyiqi
> kimi rutin vitol iŇüar…ôtl…ôrdir ‚ÄĒ bunlar h…ôr tibbi m√ľraci…ôtd…ô
> dem…ôk olar avtomatik qeyd…ô alńĪnńĪr. Hemoglobin A1c v…ô
> Glucose is…ô daha az √∂l√ß√ľl√ľr ‚ÄĒ bunlar yalnńĪz x√ľsusi
> indikasiya olduqda, y…ôni diabet riski olan pasiyentl…ôr…ô
> sifariŇü edilir. Bu √∂l√ßm…ô tezliyi f…ôrqi klinik prioritetl…ôri
> …ôks etdirir: rutin skrininq g√∂st…ôricil…ôri (boy, √ß…ôki,
> qan t…ôzyiqi) universal t…ôtbiq olunur, ixtisaslaŇümńĪŇü
> testl…ôr (HbA1c, Glucose) is…ô se√ßici istifad…ô edilir.
> Kategorik √∂l√ßm…ôl…ôr (UNITS = {nominal}) r…ôq…ômsal
> √∂l√ßm…ôl…ôrd…ôn √ßox az ‚ÄĒ bu klinik datanńĪn …ôsas…ôn
> k…ômiyy…ôt …ôsaslńĪ olduńüunu g√∂st…ôrir.



### Diaqnoz y√ľk√ľ ‚ÄĒ bir pasiyent…ô ne√ß…ô f…ôrqli x…ôst…ôlik d√ľŇü√ľr?

```{r diaqnoz_yuku, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
# H…ôr pasiyentin ne√ß…ô f…ôrqli diaqnozu var? (unikal REASONDESCRIPTION)
# Bu "x…ôst…ôlik y√ľk√ľ" (disease burden) g√∂st…ôricisidir

diaqnoz_yuku <- encounters %>%
  filter(!is.na(REASONDESCRIPTION) & REASONDESCRIPTION != "") %>%
  group_by(PATIENT) %>%
  summarise(
    `Unikal diaqnoz sayńĪ` = n_distinct(REASONDESCRIPTION),
    `√úmumi m√ľraci…ôt`      = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Statistika
yuk_stats <- diaqnoz_yuku %>%
  summarise(
    `Orta diaqnoz sayńĪ`    = round(mean(`Unikal diaqnoz sayńĪ`), 2),
    `Median`               = round(median(`Unikal diaqnoz sayńĪ`), 1),
    `Max (…ôn √ßox x…ôst…ôlik)` = max(`Unikal diaqnoz sayńĪ`),
    `1 diaqnozlu pasiyent %` = round(100 * mean(`Unikal diaqnoz sayńĪ` == 1), 1),
    `5+ diaqnozlu pasiyent %` = round(100 * mean(`Unikal diaqnoz sayńĪ` >= 5), 1),
    `10+ diaqnozlu pasiyent %`= round(100 * mean(`Unikal diaqnoz sayńĪ` >= 10), 1)
  )

kable(yuk_stats,
      caption = "<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>Pasiyent baŇüńĪna x…ôst…ôlik y√ľk√ľ statistikasńĪ</div>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)

# Paylanma histoqramńĪ
ggplot(diaqnoz_yuku, aes(x = `Unikal diaqnoz sayńĪ`)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, fill = "#8E44AD", color = "white", alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = mean(diaqnoz_yuku$`Unikal diaqnoz sayńĪ`),
             color = "#C0392B", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.9) +
  annotate("text",
           x    = mean(diaqnoz_yuku$`Unikal diaqnoz sayńĪ`) + 0.5,
           y    = Inf, vjust = 2,
           label = paste0("Ort: ",
                          round(mean(diaqnoz_yuku$`Unikal diaqnoz sayńĪ`), 1)),
           color = "#C0392B", size = 3.8, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) + 
  labs(title    = "Pasiyent baŇüńĪna unikal diaqnoz sayńĪ (x…ôst…ôlik y√ľk√ľ)",
       subtitle = "H…ôr s√ľtun 1 diaqnozluq aralńĪńüńĪ ‚ÄĒ sańüa …ôyilmiŇü paylanma",
       x = "Unikal diaqnoz sayńĪ", y = "Pasiyent sayńĪ") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "gray50"))

# X…ôst…ôlik y√ľk√ľ ~ yaŇü qrupu m√ľqayis…ôsi
diaqnoz_yuku %>%
  left_join(patients %>% select(ID, age_group, GENDER),
            by = c("PATIENT" = "ID")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(age_group)) %>%
  group_by(age_group) %>%
  summarise(
    `Orta diaqnoz` = round(mean(`Unikal diaqnoz sayńĪ`), 2),
    `Median`       = round(median(`Unikal diaqnoz sayńĪ`), 1),
    `5+ diaqnoz %` = round(100 * mean(`Unikal diaqnoz sayńĪ` >= 5), 1),
    n              = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rename(`YaŇü qrupu` = age_group) %>%
  kable(caption = "<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>YaŇü qrupu √ľzr…ô x…ôst…ôlik y√ľk√ľ</div>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)
```

> **Ňě…ôrh:** X…ôst…ôlik y√ľk√ľ analizi pasiyentl…ôrin ne√ß…ô f…ôrqli
> diaqnoz daŇüńĪdńĪńüńĪnńĪ g√∂st…ôrir ‚ÄĒ bu klinik m√ľr…ôkk…ôbliyin
> …ôsas √∂l√ß√ľs√ľd√ľr. ∆Źks…ôr pasiyent az sayda (1‚Äď3) f…ôrqli
> diaqnoza malikdir ‚ÄĒ paylanma g√ľcl√ľ sańüa …ôyilmiŇüdir.
> Lakin az sayda pasiyent √ßox y√ľks…ôk x…ôst…ôlik y√ľk√ľ
> daŇüńĪyńĪr ‚ÄĒ 10+ f…ôrqli diaqnozu olan pasiyentl…ôr
> sistemi …ôn √ßox y√ľkl…ôy…ôn qrupdur.
> YaŇü qrupu √ľzr…ô m√ľqayis…ô g√∂zl…ônil…ôn n√ľmun…ôni
> ortaya qoyur: 65+ yaŇü qrupunda orta diaqnoz sayńĪ
> …ôn y√ľks…ôkdir ‚ÄĒ bu multimorbidit…ônin yaŇüla artdńĪńüńĪnńĪ
> g√∂st…ôrir. 0‚Äď18 yaŇü qrupunda is…ô x…ôst…ôlik y√ľk√ľ …ôn
> azdńĪr, lakin k…ôskin infeksion x…ôst…ôlikl…ôr bu qrupda
> da dominant olaraq qalńĪr. Stakeholderl…ôr √ľ√ß√ľn vacib
> mesaj: "5+ diaqnozlu pasiyentl…ôr" qrupu x√ľsusi
> case management proqramlarńĪ √ľ√ß√ľn h…ôd…ôf kateqoriya
> olmalńĪdńĪr ‚ÄĒ bu qrup az sayda olsa da resurslarńĪn
> b√∂y√ľk hiss…ôsini istehlak edir.



## 1.3 Summary Statistika

```{r summary_statistika, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
klinik <- c(
  "Body Height", "Body Weight", "Body Mass Index",
  "Systolic Blood Pressure", "Diastolic Blood Pressure",
  "Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total in Blood", "Glucose"
)

skewness_manual <- function(x) {
  n <- length(x[!is.na(x)]); m <- mean(x, na.rm=T); s <- sd(x, na.rm=T)
  sum((x-m)^3, na.rm=T) / ((n-1)*s^3)
}
kurtosis_manual <- function(x) {
  n <- length(x[!is.na(x)]); m <- mean(x, na.rm=T); s <- sd(x, na.rm=T)
  sum((x-m)^4, na.rm=T) / ((n-1)*s^4)
}

summary_tbl <- obs_numeric %>%
  filter(DESCRIPTION %in% klinik) %>%
  group_by(DESCRIPTION, UNITS) %>%
  summarise(
    n        = n(),
    Mean     = round(mean(value_num, na.rm=T), 2),
    Median   = round(median(value_num, na.rm=T), 2),
    SD       = round(sd(value_num, na.rm=T), 2),
    Variance = round(var(value_num, na.rm=T), 2),
    Min      = round(min(value_num, na.rm=T), 2),
    Max      = round(max(value_num, na.rm=T), 2),
    IQR      = round(IQR(value_num, na.rm=T), 2),
    CV       = round(sd(value_num, na.rm=T)/mean(value_num, na.rm=T)*100, 1),
    Skewness = round(skewness_manual(value_num), 3),
    Kurtosis = round(kurtosis_manual(value_num), 3),
    .groups  = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rename(`G√∂st…ôrici` = DESCRIPTION, `Vahid` = UNITS)

kable(summary_tbl,
      caption = "<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>Klinik g√∂st…ôricil…ôr √ľzr…ô summary statistika</div>",
      format.args = list(big.mark = ",")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                full_width = TRUE, font_size = 12) %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%")

cv_tbl <- summary_tbl %>%
  select(G√∂st…ôrici, Vahid, Mean, SD, CV) %>%
  mutate(`D…ôyiŇük…ônlik` = case_when(
    CV < 15 ~ "AŇüańüńĪ",
    CV < 30 ~ "Orta",
    TRUE    ~ "Y√ľks…ôk"
  )) %>%
  arrange(desc(CV))

kable(cv_tbl, caption = "<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>Variasiya …ômsalńĪ (CV) √ľzr…ô d…ôyiŇük…ônlik</div>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)
```

> **Ňě…ôrh:** Klinik g√∂st…ôricil…ôr √ľzr…ô summary statistika
> c…ôdv…ôli bir ne√ß…ô vacib m…ôqamńĪ ortaya qoyur. Body Height
> √ľ√ß√ľn mean (148.79 cm) median-dan (163.33 cm) …ôh…ômiyy…ôtli
> d…ôr…ôc…ôd…ô aŇüańüńĪdńĪr ‚ÄĒ bu g√ľcl√ľ sol …ôyilm…ônin (skewness =
> -1.284) g√∂st…ôricisidir, y…ôni uŇüaq pasiyentl…ôrin boy
> √∂l√ßm…ôl…ôri bu s√ľtunu aŇüańüńĪ √ß…ôkir. BMI √ľ√ß√ľn mean (28.95)
> v…ô median (29.93) bir-birin…ô yaxńĪndńĪr ‚ÄĒ paylanma nisb…ôt…ôn
> simmetrikdir. Glucose …ôn y√ľks…ôk variansiyana (634.34)
> malikdir ‚ÄĒ bu qan Ňü…ôk…ôrinin pasiyentl…ôr arasńĪnda …ôn
> geniŇü yayńĪlan g√∂st…ôrici olduńüunu bildirir. HbA1c is…ô
> …ôn ki√ßik variansiyana (0.96) malikdir ‚ÄĒ …ôks…ôr pasiyentin
> HbA1c d…ôy…ôri 6.12% …ôtrafńĪnda c…ôml…ônmiŇüdir. Sistoliq qan
> t…ôzyiqi (SBP) √ľ√ß√ľn minimum 100 mmHg-dir ‚ÄĒ bu klinik
> olaraq ańülabatandńĪr, √ß√ľnki 100-d…ôn aŇüańüńĪ hipotenziya
> sayńĪlńĪr v…ô datada bu tip d…ôy…ôrl…ôr cleaning zamanńĪ
> artńĪq √ßńĪxarńĪlmńĪŇüdńĪ.

> **Ňě…ôrh:** Variasiya …ômsalńĪ (CV) g√∂st…ôricil…ôri
> d…ôyiŇük…ônlik d…ôr…ôc…ôsin…ô g√∂r…ô sńĪralanmńĪŇüdńĪr. Body Weight
> (CV=55.7%) v…ô BMI (CV=32.5%) "Y√ľks…ôk" d…ôyiŇük…ônlik
> kateqoriyasńĪndadńĪr ‚ÄĒ bu o dem…ôkdir ki, bu iki g√∂st…ôrici
> pasiyentl…ôr arasńĪnda …ôn geniŇü aralńĪqda d…ôyiŇüir.
> Klinik olaraq bu g√∂zl…ônil…ôndir: insanlarńĪn √ß…ôkisi
> yaŇüa, cins…ô, h…ôyat t…ôrzin…ô g√∂r…ô √ßox f…ôrql…ônir.
> Glucose (CV=27.9%), Body Height (CV=24.8%) v…ô
> Systolic Blood Pressure (CV=18.5%) "Orta" d…ôyiŇük…ônlik
> g√∂st…ôrir. Diastolic Blood Pressure is…ô CV=14.3%
> il…ô "AŇüańüńĪ" d…ôyiŇük…ônlik kateqoriyasńĪndadńĪr ‚ÄĒ
> diastolik t…ôzyiq populyasiya arasńĪnda nisb…ôt…ôn
> sabit qalńĪr, bu klinik olaraq normaldńĪr. √úmumi
> n…ôtic…ô: √ß…ôki v…ô BMI analizl…ôrind…ô f…ôrdi
> f…ôrql…ôr √ßox b√∂y√ľk olduńüundan qrup m√ľqayis…ôl…ôri
