```{r model_validation, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
  `Orta Accuracy`  = round(mean(cv_results$Accuracy), 4),
  `Std. sapma`     = round(sd(cv_results$Accuracy), 4),
  `Min`            = round(min(cv_results$Accuracy), 4),
  `Max`            = round(max(cv_results$Accuracy), 4),
  `Train Accuracy` = round(lr_acc, 4),
  `Overfitting?`   = ifelse(
    abs(lr_acc-mean(cv_results$Accuracy))>0.05,
    "B…ôli (f…ôrq>5%)","Xeyr (f…ôrq‚Č§5%)"
  )
)

kable(cv_summary, caption="<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>Cross Validation x√ľlas…ôsi</div>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options=c("striped","hover"), full_width=FALSE)

cv_results %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=factor(Fold), y=Accuracy)) +
  geom_col(fill="#2E75B6", alpha=0.85, width=0.6) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=mean(cv_results$Accuracy),
             color="#C0392B", linetype="dashed", linewidth=1) +
  geom_text(aes(label=round(Accuracy,3)),
            vjust=-0.5, size=3.8, fontface="bold") +
  annotate("text", x=4.5, y=mean(cv_results$Accuracy)+0.01,
           label=paste0("Ort: ",round(mean(cv_results$Accuracy),3)),
           color="#C0392B", size=3.8) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::percent_format(accuracy=1),
                     limits=c(0,1.1)) +
  labs(title    = paste0(k,"-fold Cross Validation ‚ÄĒ Accuracy"),
       subtitle = "QńĪrmńĪzńĪ x…ôtt: orta accuracy",
       x="Fold", y="Accuracy") +
  theme_minimal(base_size=13) +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(hjust=0.5, face="bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust=0.5, color="gray50"))
```

> **Ňě…ôrh:** Model validasiyasńĪnńĪn m…ôqs…ôdi budur: logistik reqressiya yalnńĪz bir train/test b√∂lg√ľs√ľnd…ô yaxŇüńĪ n…ôtic…ô ver…ô bil…ôr ‚ÄĒ b…ôlk…ô o b√∂lg√ľ ŇüanslńĪ idi? Bunu yoxlamaq √ľ√ß√ľn 5-fold cross validation t…ôtbiq edildi. M…ôntiq sad…ôdir: data 5 b…ôrab…ôr hiss…ôy…ô b√∂l√ľn√ľr, h…ôr d…ôf…ô 4 hiss…ô train, 1 hiss…ô test kimi istifad…ô edilir, bu proses 5 d…ôf…ô t…ôkrarlanńĪr ‚ÄĒ bel…ôlikl…ô modelin h…ôr pasiyent …ôn azńĪ bir d…ôf…ô test datasńĪnda yoxlanńĪlńĪr. 5 fold-un accuracy n…ôtic…ôl…ôrin…ô baxdńĪqda: 0.875, 0.880, 0.878, 0.879, 0.878 ‚ÄĒ d…ôy…ôrl…ôr bir-birin…ô son d…ôr…ôc…ô yaxńĪndńĪr. Std. sapma=0.0019 ‚ÄĒ bu praktiki olaraq sńĪfńĪra b…ôrab…ôrdir, model h…ôr b√∂lg√ľd…ô eyni davranńĪŇüńĪ g√∂st…ôrir. Orta CV Accuracy=0.8782, Train Accuracy=0.8781 ‚ÄĒ f…ôrq 0.0001, y…ôni overfitting yoxdur. Model n…ô train datasńĪnńĪ …ôzb…ôrl…ôyib, n…ô d…ô yeni datada √ß√∂k√ľr ‚ÄĒ stabil v…ô √ľmumil…ôŇü…ô bil…ôn bir modeldir. Bar qrafiki bu sabitliyi vizual olaraq aydńĪn g√∂st…ôrir: 5 s√ľtunun hamńĪsńĪ qńĪrmńĪzńĪ orta x…ôtt…ô yapńĪŇümńĪŇü, he√ß biri k…ônara √ßńĪxmńĪr. N…ôtic…ô: 5-fold CV modelin stabilliyini t…ôsdiql…ôdi ‚ÄĒ overfitting yoxdur, model generalizasiya edir. Lakin bu validasiya yalnńĪz Accuracy √ľz…ôrind…ôn aparńĪldńĪ; sinif balanssńĪzlńĪńüńĪ problemi burada da gizl…ônir ‚ÄĒ CV F1-score √ľz…ôrind…ôn aparńĪlsaydńĪ tablo f…ôrqli g√∂r√ľn…ôrdi.



## 3.7 T…ôdqiqat F…ôrziyy…ôl…ôri ‚ÄĒ H‚āÄ / H‚āĀ X√ľlas…ôsi

```{r xulase_ferziyyeler, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
ferziyye_tbl <- tibble(
  `#`              = 1:4,
  `F…ôrziyy…ô`       = c(
    "KiŇüi v…ô qadńĪnńĪn orta BMI-si f…ôrqlimi?",
    "Sańü qalan vs v…ôfat etmiŇü pasiyentl…ôrin yaŇüńĪ f…ôrqlimi?",
    "ńįrq qruplarńĪ arasńĪnda BMI f…ôrqi varmńĪ?",
    "KiŇüi v…ô qadńĪn √∂l√ľm nisb…ôti f…ôrqlimi?"
  ),
  `H‚āÄ` = c(
    "BMI_kiŇüi = BMI_qadńĪn",
    "YaŇü_sańü = YaŇü_v…ôfat",
    "BMI b√ľt√ľn irql…ôr √ľ√ß√ľn eyni",
    "p_kiŇüi = p_qadńĪn"
  ),
  `Test` = c(
    "Welch t-test",
    "Welch t-test",
    "One-way ANOVA",
    "Proportion Z-test"
  ),
  `p-value` = c(
    format(t_res$p.value,  scientific=TRUE),
    format(t_yas$p.value,  scientific=TRUE),
    format(anova_sum[[1]]$`Pr(>F)`[1], scientific=TRUE),
    format(p_val,          scientific=TRUE)
  ),
  `Q…ôrar (őĪ=0.05)` = c(
    ifelse(t_res$p.value<0.05,               "H‚āÄ r…ôdd","H‚āÄ q…ôbul"),
    ifelse(t_yas$p.value<0.05,               "H‚āÄ r…ôdd","H‚āÄ q…ôbul"),
    ifelse(anova_sum[[1]]$`Pr(>F)`[1]<0.05, "H‚āÄ r…ôdd","H‚āÄ q…ôbul"),
    ifelse(p_val<0.05,                        "H‚āÄ r…ôdd","H‚āÄ q…ôbul")
  ),
  `Effekt √∂l√ß√ľs√ľ` = c(
    paste0("Cohen's d=", round(cohens_d,  3)),
    paste0("Cohen's d=", round(cohens_d2, 3)),
    "Tukey post-hoc",
    "‚ÄĒ"
  )
)

kable(ferziyye_tbl,
      caption="<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>Hipotez testl…ôrinin yekun x√ľlas…ôsi</div>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options=c("striped","hover","condensed"),
                full_width=TRUE) %>%
  row_spec(which(ferziyye_tbl$`Q…ôrar (őĪ=0.05)`=="H‚āÄ r…ôdd"),
           background="#FCEBEB") %>%
  row_spec(which(ferziyye_tbl$`Q…ôrar (őĪ=0.05)`=="H‚āÄ q…ôbul"),
           background="#EAF3DE") %>%
  scroll_box(width="100%")

reg_xulase <- tibble(
  Model          = c("Sad…ô x…ôtti req. (YaŇü ‚Üí HbA1c)",
                     "√áoxd…ôyiŇü…ônli req. (BMI+YaŇü+Cins ‚Üí HbA1c)",
                     "Logistik req. (√Ėl√ľm proqnozu)"),
  `R¬≤ / AUC`    = c(round(slr_sum$r.squared,  4),
                     round(mlr_sum$r.squared,  4),
                     auc_val),
  `RMSE / F1`   = c(round(sqrt(mean(residuals(model_slr)^2)), 4),
                     round(sqrt(mean(residuals(model_mlr)^2)), 4),
                     lr_f1),
  `∆Źsas tapńĪntńĪ` = c(
    "YaŇü HbA1c-ni z…ôif proqnozlaŇüdńĪrńĪr",
    "BMI+YaŇü birlikd…ô daha g√ľcl√ľ izah verir",
    paste0("AUC=", auc_val, " ‚ÄĒ model q…ôbul edil…ô bil…ôr")
  )
)

kable(reg_xulase,
      caption="<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>Reqressiya modell…ôri ‚ÄĒ yekun x√ľlas…ôsi</div>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options=c("striped","hover"), full_width=FALSE)
```

> **Ňě…ôrh:** Bu analiz b√ľt√ľn aparńĪlmńĪŇü hipotez testl…ôrinin v…ô reqressiya modell…ôrinin yekun c…ôdv…ôlidir. D√∂rd hipotez testind…ôn ikisi H‚āÄ r…ôdd, ikisi H‚āÄ q…ôbul n…ôtic…ôsi verdi. H‚āÄ r…ôdd edil…ônl…ôr (qńĪrmńĪzńĪ): kiŇüi-qadńĪn BMI f…ôrqi ‚ÄĒ t-test p=2.22e-44, lakin Cohen's d=0.086 g√∂st…ôrir ki, statistik f…ôrq var, praktiki …ôh…ômiyy…ôt is…ô √ßox ki√ßikdir; sańü qalan vs v…ôfat etmiŇü yaŇü f…ôrqi ‚ÄĒ t-test p‚Čą0, Cohen's d=0.844 il…ô layih…ônin …ôn g√ľcl√ľ tapńĪntńĪsńĪdńĪr, h…ôm statistik h…ôm praktiki …ôh…ômiyy…ôtlidir; √∂l√ľm nisb…ôti cins f…ôrqi ‚ÄĒ Z-test p‚Čą0. H‚āÄ q…ôbul edil…ôn (yaŇüńĪl): irq √ľzr…ô BMI ‚ÄĒ ANOVA p=0.136, irq BMI-ni f…ôrql…ôndirmir. Reqressiya x√ľlas…ôsind…ô: sad…ô model R¬≤=0.030 ‚ÄĒ z…ôif; √ßoxd…ôyiŇü…ônli model R¬≤=0.064 ‚ÄĒ daha g√ľcl√ľ, lakin h…ôl…ô aŇüańüńĪ; logistik reqressiya AUC=0.7566 ‚ÄĒ …ôn g√ľcl√ľ model. Yekun: yaŇü bu datasetd…ô …ôn dominant d…ôyiŇü…ôndir. Statistik …ôh…ômiyy…ôtlilik praktiki …ôh…ômiyy…ôti h…ômiŇü…ô s√ľbut etmir ‚ÄĒ b√∂y√ľk n h…ôr f…ôrqi significant g√∂st…ôrir, effekt √∂l√ß√ľs√ľ h…ôqiqi m…ônasńĪnńĪ s√∂yl…ôyir.

# 4. X√ľlas…ô

## 4.1 ∆Źsas TapńĪntńĪlar

```{r xulase_esas_tapintilar, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
tapintilar <- tibble(
  `B√∂lm…ô` = c(
    "1. Deskriptiv", "1. Deskriptiv", "1. Deskriptiv",
    "1. Deskriptiv", "1. Deskriptiv", "1. Deskriptiv",
    "2. Anomaliyalar", "2. Anomaliyalar", "2. Anomaliyalar",
    "2. Anomaliyalar", "2. Anomaliyalar",
    "3. Proqnoz", "3. Proqnoz", "3. Proqnoz"
  ),
  `∆Źsas tapńĪntńĪ` = c(
    paste0("Orta yaŇü ", round(mean(patients$age, na.rm=T), 1), " ‚ÄĒ …ôn b√∂y√ľk qrup 41‚Äď65 yaŇü"),
    "Cins paylanmasńĪ dem…ôk olar b…ôrab…ôrdir ‚ÄĒ F/M ~50/50",
    paste0("√úmumi √∂l√ľm nisb…ôti ", round(100*mean(!is.na(patients$DEATHDATE)), 1), "% ‚ÄĒ 95% CI hesablanmńĪŇüdńĪr"),
    "YaŇüayńĪŇü Ňü…ôh…ôri (ADDRESS) vs dońüum yeri (BIRTHPLACE) m√ľqayis…ôsi: eyni dominant Ňü…ôh…ôrl…ôr, lakin yaŇüayńĪŇü daha geniŇü cońürafi yayńĪlma g√∂st…ôrir",
    "ńįrq √ó Ail…ô v…ôziyy…ôti: evlilik h…ôr irq qrupunda dominant, 'M…ôlumat yoxdur' b√ľt√ľn qruplarda sistematik boŇüluq yaradńĪr",
    "65+ yaŇü qrupu m√ľraci…ôt intensivliyi …ôn y√ľks…ôkdir; 19‚Äď40 yaŇü qadńĪnlar kiŇüil…ôrd…ôn √ßox m√ľraci…ôt edir (hamil…ôlik)",
    paste0("Data cleaning: ", format(sum(c(19,2620,115,10978,13963,148)), big.mark=","), " problemli qeyd aŇükar edilib, t…ômizl…ônib"),
    "Glucose-da …ôn √ßox IQR outlier ‚ÄĒ diabet x…ôst…ôl…ôri; Modified Z-score (MAD) regular Z-d…ôn daha √ßox outlier aŇükarlayńĪr",
    paste0("KiŇüi vs QadńĪn BMI: p=", format(t_res$p.value, scientific=TRUE), ", Cohen's d=", round(cohens_d,3), " ‚ÄĒ statistik var, praktiki …ôh…ômiyy…ôtsiz"),
    paste0("V…ôfat vs sańü yaŇü: Cohen's d=", round(cohens_d2,3), " ‚ÄĒ layih…ônin …ôn g√ľcl√ľ tapńĪntńĪsńĪ"),
    paste0("ńįrq √ľzr…ô BMI ANOVA: p=", format(anova_sum[[1]]$`Pr(>F)`[1], scientific=TRUE), " ‚ÄĒ H‚āÄ q…ôbul, irq BMI-ni f…ôrql…ôndirmir"),
    paste0("Sad…ô req. R¬≤=", round(slr_sum$r.squared,3), " ‚ÄĒ yaŇü HbA1c-ni z…ôif proqnozlaŇüdńĪrńĪr"),
    paste0("√áox req. Adj.R¬≤=", round(mlr_sum$adj.r.squared,3), " ‚ÄĒ BMI …ôlav…ôsi modeli g√ľcl…ôndirir"),
    paste0("Logistik req. AUC=", auc_val, " ‚ÄĒ √∂l√ľm proqnozu q…ôbul edil…ô bil…ôn h…ôdd…ôdir")
  )
)

kable(tapintilar,
      caption = "<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>B√ľt√ľn b√∂lm…ôl…ôr √ľzr…ô …ôsas tapńĪntńĪlar</div>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover","condensed"),
                full_width = TRUE, font_size = 12)
```

> **Ňě…ôrh:** 132,000+ sintetik pasiyent √ľz…ôrind…ô aparńĪlmńĪŇü bu analizin …ôn g√ľcl√ľ tapńĪntńĪsńĪ yaŇü il…ô √∂l√ľm statusu arasńĪndakńĪ …ôlaq…ôdir ‚ÄĒ v…ôfat etmiŇü pasiyentl…ôr sańü qalanlardan orta hesabla 18.5 yaŇü b√∂y√ľkd√ľr (Cohen's d=0.844, b√∂y√ľk effekt). ńįrq BMI-ni f…ôrql…ôndirmir ‚ÄĒ ANOVA p=0.136 il…ô H‚āÄ q…ôbul edilir. Reqressiya modell…ôri g√∂st…ôrdi ki, m√∂vcud d…ôyiŇü…ônl…ôr HbA1c-ni tam izah etm…ôk √ľ√ß√ľn kifay…ôt deyil ‚ÄĒ R¬≤=0.064 il…ô variasiyasńĪnńĪn 94%-i izahsńĪz qalńĪr.

## 4.2 Limitasiyalar v…ô T√∂vsiy…ôl…ôr

```{r xulase_limitasiya, warning=F, error=F, message=F}
limit_tbl <- tibble(
  `#` = 1:7,
  `Kateqoriya` = c(
    "Sintetik data", "Sintetik data",
    "Statistik g√ľc", "KauzallńĪq",
    "Model", "Model", "G…ôl…ôc…ôk istiqam…ôt"
  ),
  `Limitasiya / T√∂vsiy…ô` = c(
    "Bu dataset Synthea t…ôr…ôfind…ôn simulyasiya edilmiŇüdir ‚ÄĒ real populyasiyanńĪ tam …ôks etdirmir. Klinik q…ôrarlar √ľ√ß√ľn istifad…ô edilm…ôm…ôlidir.",
    "Sintetik datada b…ôzi statistik n…ôtic…ôl…ôr real datadan f…ôrqli ola bil…ôr ‚ÄĒ x√ľsusil…ô nadir x…ôst…ôlikl…ôr √ľ√ß√ľn. ńįrq v…ô ail…ô v…ôziyy…ôti √ßarpaz analizind…ôki f…ôrql…ôr real sosio-demoqrafik n…ôtic…ô kimi q…ôbul edilm…ôm…ôlidir.",
    "B√∂y√ľk n (132,000+) s…ôb…ôbind…ôn h…ôtta √ßox ki√ßik f…ôrql…ôr statistik …ôh…ômiyy…ôtli √ßńĪxńĪr ‚ÄĒ effekt √∂l√ß√ľs√ľ (Cohen's d) m√ľtl…ôq n…ôz…ôr…ô alńĪnmalńĪdńĪr. √áebyŇüev b…ôrab…ôrsizliyi normal olmayan paylanmalar √ľ√ß√ľn metodoloji c…ôh…ôtd…ôn daha d√ľzg√ľn yanaŇümadńĪr.",
    "Korrelyasiya kauzallńĪq deyil ‚ÄĒ yaŇü~HbA1c …ôlaq…ôsi yaŇüńĪn HbA1c-y…ô birbaŇüa s…ôb…ôb olduńüunu s√ľbut etmir.",
    paste0("Reqressiya modell…ôri R¬≤=", round(mlr_sum$r.squared,3), " ‚ÄĒ izah edilm…ômiŇü variasiya y√ľks…ôkdir. ∆Źlav…ô klinik d…ôyiŇü…ônl…ôr (diabet statusu, d…ôrman q…ôbulu) lazńĪmdńĪr."),
    "Klassifikasiya modell…ôri sinif balanssńĪzlńĪńüńĪndan (78% Sańü, 22% V…ôfat) ciddi Ňü…ôkild…ô t…ôsirl…ônib ‚ÄĒ SMOTE t√∂vsiy…ô edilir.",
    "G…ôl…ôc…ôkd…ô: survival analysis, x…ôst…ô klasterl…ôŇüdirm…ô, SMOTE il…ô balanslaŇüdńĪrńĪlmńĪŇü model, yaŇüayńĪŇü Ňü…ôh…ôri √ľzr…ô sańülamlńĪq xidm…ôti …ôl√ßatanlńĪq analizi, real data il…ô m√ľqayis…ô t√∂vsiy…ô edilir."
  )
)

kable(limit_tbl,
      caption = "<div style='text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:15px;'>Limitasiyalar, qeydl…ôr v…ô g…ôl…ôc…ôk t√∂vsiy…ôl…ôr</div>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover","condensed"),
                full_width = TRUE, font_size = 12) %>%
  column_spec(3, width = "60%")
```

> **Ňě…ôrh:** Bu analizin …ôsas m…ôhdudiyy…ôti datanńĪn sintetik olmasńĪdńĪr ‚ÄĒ Synthea t…ôr…ôfind…ôn generasiya edilmiŇü bu dataset real klinik q…ôrarlara birbaŇüa t…ôtbiq edilm…ôm…ôlidir. Metodoloji baxńĪmdan …ôn m√ľh√ľm qeyd statistik g√ľcl…ô bańülńĪdńĪr: 132,000+ pasiyentlik bu n√ľmun…ôd…ô p-d…ôy…ôri dem…ôk olar h…ôr f…ôrqi …ôh…ômiyy…ôtli g√∂st…ôrir ‚ÄĒ buna g√∂r…ô effekt √∂l√ß√ľs√ľ bildirilm…ôd…ôn p-d…ôy…ôri t…ôk baŇüńĪna m…ônasńĪzdńĪr. Klassifikasiya modell…ôrind…ôki sinif balanssńĪzlńĪńüńĪ (kNN F1=0.226) g…ôl…ôc…ôk iŇüin …ôsas prioritetidir. Survival analysis is…ô bu dataset √ľ√ß√ľn …ôn perspektivli n√∂vb…ôti addńĪmdńĪr ‚ÄĒ √∂l√ľm vaxtńĪnńĪn proqnozu m√∂vcud modell…ôr…ô nisb…ôt…ôn √ßox daha z…ôngin m…ôlumat ver…ôr.
